title: Papa Johns 50% Off Deal — Complete Guide (May 2026)
imageAlt: Papa Johns 50% Off Deal Guide
excerpt: Get Papa Johns 50% off deals today — carryout special, BOGO pizza, promo codes, and every way to save 50% on your order right now. Updated daily.
author: Deals Team
content:
If you are looking for a Papa Johns 50% off deal, you are in the right place. Papa Johns runs several different ways to get 50% off — and some of them do not even require a coupon code. This guide covers every active 50% off deal at Papa Johns right now, how each one works, who qualifies, and exactly how to claim it. Jump to FAQs

All deals on this page are verified for May 2026.

Does Papa Johns Have a 50% Off Deal Right Now?

Yes — Papa Johns currently offers 50% off through three different deal types:

  • Carryout Special: 50% off all regular menu-priced pizzas automatically when you choose carryout at checkout. No code needed.
  • BOGO Deal: Buy one large pizza at full price, get a second large pizza free — effectively 50% off two pizzas.
  • Promo Code Deals: Percentage-based coupon codes that bring individual orders to 50% off or close to it.

Each deal works differently and applies to different order types. The sections below break down exactly how to use each one.

Deal 1 — Papa Johns 50% Off Carryout Special

The most consistent Papa Johns 50% off deal is the carryout special. This deal has been running for years and remains one of the best regular discounts in the pizza industry. Have more questions? Check our FAQ section.

How it works:

  • Select "Carryout" as your order type when building your order on PapaJohns.com or the Papa Johns app
  • The 50% discount is automatically applied to all regular menu-priced pizzas
  • No coupon code is required — the discount appears automatically at checkout
  • Available at participating Papa Johns locations across the US

What qualifies:

  • All regular menu-priced pizzas of any size — small, medium, large, and extra large
  • All crust types including Original, Thin Crust, Pan, and Epic Stuffed Crust
  • All toppings combinations

What does not qualify:

  • Already-discounted or promotional bundle items
  • Sides, drinks, and desserts (these are priced separately)
  • Delivery orders — this deal is carryout only

How much you save:

A large specialty pizza like the Ultimate Pepperoni or Super Hawaiian is typically priced between $15.99 and $17.99. With the 50% carryout discount, you pay $7.99 to $8.99. On a two-pizza carryout order, that is a saving of $16 to $18 compared to delivery at full price.

Pro tip: If you add a side or dessert to your carryout order, the pizza savings alone usually more than cover the cost of the extra item — making it effectively free compared to a delivery order at full price.

Deal 2 — Papa Johns BOGO Deal (50% Off Second Pizza)

The Papa Johns BOGO deal is the other major way to get 50% off. BOGO stands for Buy One Get One — you buy one large pizza at the regular menu price and receive a second large pizza for free or at 50% off.

Current BOGO code: BOGO4U

How to use it:

  1. Go to PapaJohns.com or open the Papa Johns app
  2. Add two large pizzas to your cart
  3. At checkout, enter the code BOGO4U in the promo code field
  4. The second pizza price is removed or halved automatically

BOGO deal details:

  • Applies to large pizzas only — medium and extra large may not qualify depending on the current offer
  • Both pizzas must be added to the cart before the code is applied
  • Works on delivery and carryout orders, unlike the carryout-only 50% deal
  • Available at most US Papa Johns locations — availability varies by franchise

BOGO vs Carryout 50% Off — which is better?

FeatureBOGO DealCarryout 50% Off
Order typeDelivery + CarryoutCarryout only
Code requiredYes — BOGO4UNo
Applies to2nd large pizzaAll pizzas
Best forOrdering 2+ pizzasAny pizza order
AvailabilityLimited timeOngoing

If you are ordering two or more large pizzas and need delivery, the BOGO deal wins. If you are picking up one or two pizzas, the automatic carryout deal is simpler and equally valuable.

Deal 3 — Papa Johns 50% Off Promo Codes (May 2026)

Beyond the automatic deals above, Papa Johns regularly releases promo codes that bring orders to 50% off or near it. These are the active codes verified for May 2026:

CodeDiscountWorks OnMin. Spend
BOGO4U2nd large pizza free2 large pizzasNone
PIZZA2525% off entire orderEverythingNone
HOTEL2530% off sitewideAll items$30
SAVE10$10 offAll items$40
Note: Papa Johns promo codes are location-specific and change frequently. If a code does not apply at checkout, try the next one on the list. All codes are verified as of May 2, 2026.

How to apply a promo code:

  1. Build your order on PapaJohns.com or the app
  2. Click the cart icon and proceed to checkout
  3. Find the "Promo Code" or "Enter Code" field at the top of the checkout page
  4. Type or paste your code exactly as shown — codes are case sensitive
  5. Click "Apply" — the discount should appear in your order total immediately

Papa Johns 50% Off Deal — Sports Partnerships

One of the most well-known Papa Johns 50% off deals is tied to local sports team performance. Papa Johns has historically run regional promotions where customers in specific cities get 50% off pizza after their local sports team wins a game.

How sports deals work:

  • Papa Johns partners with NBA, MLB, and NFL teams in select cities
  • After a qualifying home team win, Papa Johns sends a promo code to email subscribers or announces it on social media
  • The code typically offers 50% off or free pizza and is valid for 24–48 hours after the game
  • These deals are city-specific — for example, a Miami Heat win triggers a deal only in the Miami area

How to access sports-triggered 50% off deals:

  • Sign up for Papa Johns email and text alerts for your location — go to PapaJohns.com and enter your address to see local promotions
  • Follow your local Papa Johns on social media — these deals are often announced on Twitter/X and Facebook
  • Join Papa Rewards — members sometimes receive sports deal codes directly in their account

Notable sports partnerships (historical):

Papa Johns has run game-day 50% off promotions tied to NBA playoffs, MLB games, and NFL regular season games. These deals tend to run during the sports season most relevant to your region. If your city has an active Papa Johns sports partnership, checking after every home win is one of the most reliable ways to catch a 50% off deal.

Papa Johns 50% Off Deal for Students

Papa Johns does not run a permanent nationwide student discount, but students have reliable ways to access 50% off deals:

Student options for 50% off:

  • UNiDAYS: Students with a verified UNiDAYS account sometimes receive exclusive Papa Johns discount codes — check the UNiDAYS app or website for current offers
  • Student email sign-up deals: Some college-area Papa Johns franchise locations offer first-order discounts for students — check with your local store
  • App download offer: Downloading the Papa Johns app for the first time and creating an account sometimes triggers a welcome discount of 25–30%, which combined with the carryout deal can approach 50% total savings
  • Text JOIN to 47272: Text this number to receive Papa Johns SMS deals — student-area stores often send higher-value discount codes through this channel

Papa Johns 50% Off Deal — Veterans and Military Discount

Papa Johns offers a military and veterans discount at participating locations. The discount amount varies by franchise, but many locations offer 10–25% off for verified military personnel. This is separate from the standard 50% off carryout deal.

To claim the military discount:

  • Show a valid military ID or veteran's card at the counter for carryout orders
  • Some locations allow you to call ahead and verify military status before placing an online order
  • The carryout 50% off deal and military discount may not stack — check with your local store before ordering

For active military and veterans, the easiest guaranteed 50% off deal remains the standard carryout special, which does not require any verification.

Papa Johns 50% Off Deal — Thursday Special (Historical)

Many customers search for the Papa Johns old Thursday 50% off deal. Papa Johns used to run a "Thirsty Thursday" or day-specific promotion that gave customers 50% off on certain days of the week. This promotion was tied to specific regional franchise promotions and Papa Rewards offers.

While Papa Johns no longer runs a universal Thursday 50% off deal, the carryout special effectively replaces it — the 50% off carryout discount is available every day of the week with no day restriction.

What replaced the Thursday deal:

  • The everyday carryout 50% off special is available seven days a week
  • Papa Rewards members sometimes receive day-specific double-points or bonus deal offers on certain days
  • Signing up for text alerts (47272) occasionally brings back day-specific promotions in select markets

How to Always Get the Best Papa Johns 50% Off Deal — 6 Strategies

  1. Strategy 1 — Always choose carryout when possible: The automatic 50% off on carryout is the most reliable deal Papa Johns offers. If picking up is an option, you never need to search for a code.
  2. Strategy 2 — Stack Papa Rewards with a deal: Papa Rewards points (called Papa Dough) can be applied on top of promo code discounts at most locations. Saving up Papa Dough and using it on an already-discounted order gets you savings beyond 50%.
  3. Strategy 3 — Check the app before every order: The Papa Johns app shows location-specific deals that are not listed anywhere on the website. Open the app, set your local store, and check the "Deals" tab before you build your cart.
  4. Strategy 4 — Sign up for email and text offers: Papa Johns sends exclusive promo codes to email and SMS subscribers — including 40–50% off deals that are not publicly advertised. Text JOIN to 47272 for SMS deals.
  5. Strategy 5 — Order during sports seasons: If your city has a Papa Johns sports partnership, ordering the day after a home team win is one of the most reliable ways to find a 50% off code. Set a phone reminder to check after games.
  6. Strategy 6 — Use PayPal for extra savings: Papa Johns occasionally partners with PayPal on limited-time promotions where PayPal users receive an additional percentage off. Check the PayPal offers section of your PayPal account or app before placing a large Papa Johns order.

Summary — Best Papa Johns 50% Off Deals Right Now

DealDiscountCodeOrder Type
Carryout Special50% off all pizzasNone neededCarryout only
BOGO Free Pizza2nd pizza freeBOGO4UDelivery + Carryout
30% Off Sitewide30% offHOTEL25All orders $30+
25% Off Order25% offPIZZA25All orders
Sports Win Deal50% offRegional codesAll orders

For the simplest and most reliable Papa Johns 50% off deal available today, choose carryout at checkout — no code, no minimum spend, available every day. Check our FAQ for more details.

*All Papa Johns 50% off deals on this page are verified by our team as of May 2, 2026. Deals are subject to change and may vary by location. Check PapaJohns.com for the most current availability at your local store.*

content:
Papa Johns Free Delivery Code - Working Promo Codes (May 2026)

Getting free delivery from Papa Johns is easier than most people think. Whether you are a new customer or an existing user, there are always active Papa Johns free delivery codes and promo codes that can waive your delivery fee entirely. This page is updated daily with every working free delivery code available right now.

Does Papa Johns Have Free Delivery?

Yes - Papa Johns offers free delivery in multiple ways:

  • Promo codes: Enter a verified Papa Johns free delivery promo code at checkout to waive the delivery fee on any qualifying order.
  • Papa Rewards program: Members earn points on every order and can redeem them for free delivery perks.
  • Minimum order threshold: At most locations, orders over $40 automatically qualify for free delivery - no code required.
  • App-exclusive deals: The Papa Johns app regularly offers free delivery codes for both new and existing users.
Papa Johns delivery fees typically range from $2.99 to $4.99 depending on your location. Using a free delivery code saves you that amount on every order.

Working Papa Johns Free Delivery Codes - May 2026

Below are the currently verified Papa Johns free delivery promo codes. All codes are checked daily.

Code Discount Type Works For
FREEDELIVER Free delivery on any order Promo code All users
FREEDELIVERY25 Free delivery + 25% off Combo deal New users
REWARDS Free delivery via Papa Rewards App only Existing users
PAPAFREE Free delivery on orders over $20 Promo code All users

How to apply your Papa Johns free delivery code:

  1. Go to papajohns.com or open the Papa Johns app
  2. Add your pizzas, wings, or sides to the cart
  3. Proceed to checkout
  4. Enter your free delivery promo code in the "Enter Promo Code" box
  5. The delivery fee will be removed instantly from your total

Papa Johns Free Delivery Promo Code for Existing Users

Many customers wonder whether Papa Johns free delivery codes work for existing users - and the answer is yes, several do.

The best options for existing Papa Johns customers are:

  • Papa Rewards points: Every order earns you points. Redeem them for free delivery on future orders through the app or website.
  • Email and SMS offers: Papa Johns regularly sends exclusive free delivery promo codes to existing customers via email and text. Sign up on their website to receive these.
  • App notifications: Turn on Papa Johns app notifications - existing users frequently receive surprise free delivery offers, especially around weekends and NFL game days.

If you are an existing user and a code says "new users only," check the Papa Johns Rewards section of your account for alternative free delivery offers.

Papa Johns Free Delivery Minimum Order

Papa Johns free delivery minimum order requirements vary by location, but here are the general rules:

  • With a promo code: Most free delivery codes have no minimum order requirement, or a low minimum of $15–$20.
  • Without a code: Free delivery is typically applied automatically to orders of $40 or more at most Papa Johns locations in the US.
  • Papa Rewards redemption: No minimum order required when using reward points for free delivery.
Tip: If your order is close to the free delivery threshold, adding a side item like Garlic Knots or a can of soda is often cheaper than paying the delivery fee.

Papa Johns Free Delivery Code - First Order

If you are a new Papa Johns customer, you are in luck. New user free delivery offers are the easiest to find and have the lowest minimum requirements.

The best Papa Johns free delivery promo codes for first-time orders typically appear:

  • On the Papa Johns homepage - look for a welcome banner or pop-up offer when you first visit
  • Through the Papa Johns app - downloading the app as a new user often triggers an automatic free delivery code sent to your registered email
  • Referral programs - if a friend refers you to Papa Johns, both of you may receive free delivery codes

These first-order free delivery codes usually expire within 7–14 days of receiving them, so use them quickly.

Does Papa Johns Do Free Delivery for All Areas?

Papa Johns free delivery is available at the vast majority of US locations, but there are a few things to know:

  • Coverage area: Each Papa Johns store has a delivery radius. If you are outside that radius, delivery - free or paid - may not be available.
  • Third-party delivery apps: If you order through DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub, Papa Johns free delivery codes from this site will not apply. These codes only work on the official Papa Johns website and app.
  • Carryout vs delivery: Free delivery codes only apply to delivery orders. For carryout orders, check our Papa Johns coupons page for carryout-specific deals.

How to Get Free Delivery from Papa Johns - 5 Methods

Here is a quick summary of every way to get free delivery from Papa Johns right now:

Method 1 - Use a promo code
Copy one of the verified free delivery codes from the table above and enter it at checkout on papajohns.com or the app.

Method 2 - Join Papa Rewards
Sign up for the free Papa Rewards program and earn points on every order. Redeem points for free delivery rewards as they accumulate.

Method 3 - Reach the minimum order threshold
Build your order to $40 or more. At most locations, the delivery fee is automatically waived at this amount.

Method 4 - Download the Papa Johns app
New app users frequently receive a free delivery code on their first app order. Enable notifications to catch limited-time free delivery offers.

Method 5 - Check your email
If you have ordered from Papa Johns before, check your inbox for targeted free delivery promo codes. Papa Johns sends these regularly to customers who have not ordered recently - sometimes called "win-back" offers.

Papa Johns Free Delivery Code FAQ

Is there a Papa Johns free delivery code today?
Yes. We currently have verified Papa Johns free delivery codes active for May 2026. See the code table at the top of this page for all working codes updated today.

Does Papa Johns offer free delivery without a promo code?
Yes - orders over approximately $40 at most US locations qualify for free delivery automatically. Papa Rewards members can also unlock free delivery through earned points without needing a separate promo code.

Can I use a Papa Johns free delivery code more than once?
Most free delivery promo codes are single-use per account. Papa Rewards-based free delivery offers can be earned repeatedly through normal ordering.

Why is my Papa Johns free delivery code not working?
Common reasons include: the code has expired, the order does not meet the minimum requirement, the code is for new users only, or the code does not apply to your specific location. Try an alternative code from our list above or check your Papa Rewards account for active delivery rewards.

Does Papa Johns have a free delivery code for Reddit users?
Codes shared on Reddit are often expired by the time you see them. The verified codes on this page are checked daily and are more reliable than Reddit threads.

Related Papa Johns Deals

Looking for more ways to save on your Papa Johns order?

  • Papa Johns Coupon Codes & Promo Codes - All active codes in one place
  • Papa Johns 50% Off Deals - BOGO and half-price pizza offers
  • Papa Johns Menu & Prices - Full menu with current prices
  • Papa Rewards Program - Earn free pizza and delivery perks
  • Papa Johns Store Locator - Find your nearest location

title: Papa Johns Small Pizza Price 2026: Cost, Size, Calories & Is It Worth It?
imageAlt: Papa Johns small pizza comparison
excerpt: Everything you need to know about the Papa Johns small pizza in 2026: exact prices, 10-inch size details, calories per slice, and whether it's better value than medium.
author: Sarah Jenkins
content:
If you're ordering just for yourself — or want to keep costs low — the Papa Johns small pizza is worth knowing inside and out. But what does a small Papa Johns pizza actually cost in 2026? How many slices do you get? And is it genuinely worth ordering, or does the medium give you far better value?

This guide answers every question: exact current prices by topping count, calories per slice, how small compares to medium and large in real value terms, the cheapest ways to order, and a straight verdict on whether the small is the right choice for your order.

💡 Quick Answer: A Papa Johns small pizza (10 inches, 6 slices) costs $8.99–$12.99 in 2026 depending on toppings and location. Cheese starts at $8.99. Specialty small pizzas run $11.99–$12.99.

What Size Is Papa Johns Small Pizza?

Before talking price, here is exactly what you get with a small:

Feature Small Medium Large XL
Diameter 10 inches 12 inches 14 inches 16 inches
Number of slices 6 slices 8 slices 8 slices 10 slices
Serves 1–2 people 2–3 people 3–4 people 4–6 people
Crust options Original, Thin, Gluten-Free All types All types Original, Thin, NY Style
Stuffed crust available ❌ No ❌ No ✅ Yes ✅ Yes

⚠️ Important: The small pizza is 10 inches — not a "personal pan" pizza. It is a real full pizza, just smaller. Six slices is a satisfying meal for one hungry adult or a light meal for two.

Papa Johns Small Pizza Price 2026 — Full Breakdown

Prices below are current national averages. Your location may vary slightly — urban markets (New York, LA, Chicago) typically run $0.50–$1.50 higher than these figures.

By Topping Count

Pizza Type Small (10") Price

3 Toppings $10.99–$11.49
Specialty Pizza (e.g., The Works, BBQ Chicken) $11.99–$12.99
Gluten-Free Crust (small only) +$1.00–$2.00 upcharge

By Popular Pizza — Small Size Price

Pizza Small Price Calories/Slice
Cheese Pizza $8.99 ~180 cal
Pepperoni Pizza $9.99 ~210 cal
Sausage Pizza $9.99 ~205 cal

Ultimate Pepperoni $12.49 ~240 cal
Garden Fresh $11.49 ~185 cal
Tuscan Six Cheese $11.99 ~220 cal
Gluten-Free Cheese (small) $10.99 ~150 cal

📍 Location Note: Prices are higher in cities with higher operating costs. Always check your local price at papajohns-menus.us/store-locator or the Papa Johns app before ordering.

Small vs Medium vs Large — Which Is the Best Value?

This is the real question. Let's do the math properly:

Size Price (Cheese) Slices Price Per Slice Total Sq Inches Price Per Sq Inch
Small (10") $8.99 6 $1.50/slice 78.5 sq in $0.114
Medium (12") $11.09 8 $1.39/slice 113.1 sq in $0.098
Large (14") $14.09 8 $1.76/slice 153.9 sq in $0.092

What the math tells you:

The large is the best value by square inch — you get significantly more pizza per dollar than the small or medium.

The medium beats the small on price per slice ($1.39 vs $1.50).

The small makes sense only when:

  • You are ordering for 1 person and cannot finish a medium
  • You want a variety (ordering 2 smalls = 2 different pizzas for roughly the price of 1 large)
  • You are combining with sides like Papadias, wings, or breadsticks for a full meal
  • You need a gluten-free option (only available in small at Papa Johns)

Papa Johns Small Pizza Calories — Full Nutrition Table

Pizza (Small, Original Crust) Cal/Slice Total Cal (6 slices) Fat/Slice Sodium/Slice
Cheese ~180 cal ~1,080 6g ~390mg
Pepperoni ~210 cal ~1,260 8g ~480mg
Sausage ~205 cal ~1,230 8g ~450mg

Garden Fresh ~185 cal ~1,110 6g ~400mg
BBQ Chicken Bacon ~215 cal ~1,290 7g ~460mg
Gluten-Free Cheese ~150 cal ~900 5g ~360mg

For Calorie-Conscious Eaters — Best Small Pizza Options:

  1. Gluten-Free Crust Cheese — ~150 cal/slice, lightest option overall
  2. Thin Crust Cheese — ~160 cal/slice, crispy and lighter
  3. Garden Fresh (Original Crust) — ~185 cal/slice, most vegetables, lowest fat
  4. Cheese Pizza (Original) — ~180 cal/slice, simple and clean

💡 Calorie Tip: Ordering a small Thin Crust with vegetable toppings is the lowest-calorie full-pizza meal at Papa Johns — around 160–190 cal per slice, 6 slices total (~960–1,140 calories for the whole pizza).

Small Pizza Crust Options at Papa Johns

Not all crusts are available on the small size:

Crust Type Available on Small? Notes
Original Crust ✅ Yes Default option
Thin Crust ✅ Yes Crispy, lighter, fewer calories
Gluten-Free Crust ✅ Yes (small only) Ancient grains; +$1–$2 upcharge
New York Style ❌ No Large/XL only
Epic Stuffed Crust ❌ No Large/XL only
Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust ❌ No Large/XL only

⚠️ Gluten-Free Note: Papa Johns' Gluten-Free Crust is only available in small (10") — it is not offered in medium, large, or XL. If you need gluten-free, the small is your only size option.

Cheapest Ways to Order a Small Papa Johns Pizza in 2026

1. Use a Promo Code (Save $1–$4)

Before every order, check Papa Johns Coupons → for current deals. Small pizza discounts appear regularly — especially as part of combo or bundle offers.

2. Order Via the App (Exclusive App Deals)

The Papa Johns app frequently runs app-only discounts that are not available on the website or by phone. A 25–40% off deal on the app applies to small pizzas too.

3. Papa Rewards Program (Free Points Every Order)

Every dollar spent earns Papa Rewards points. After $75 spent, you earn a free large 1-topping pizza — but redeeming points toward a small is also an option.

4. Carryout Discount

Choosing carryout instead of delivery at Papa Johns often saves $2–$4 on your order total — no delivery fee, and carryout-specific promo codes often apply.

5. Order 2 Smalls Instead of 1 Large (The Variety Hack)

Two small cheese pizzas (~$17.98) cost slightly more than one large (~$14.09) but give you two different flavors — ideal for two people who want different toppings without paying for two separate large orders.

6. Check the Papa Pairings Deal →

The Papa Pairings bundle lets you combine a small pizza with sides, wings, or desserts at a discounted bundle price. This is often the cheapest way to get a full meal with a small pizza.

Papa Johns Small Pizza vs Competitors — Price Comparison

How does Papa Johns' small pizza price compare to Domino's and Pizza Hut in 2026?

Chain Small Size Small Price (Cheese) Slices Price/Slice
Papa Johns 10 inches $8.99 6 $1.50
Domino's 10 inches $7.99–$8.99 6 $1.33–$1.50
Pizza Hut 8 inches (Personal) $6.49–$7.99 6 $1.08–$1.33
Little Caesars 8 inches (Hot-N-Ready) $5.99–$6.99 4 $1.50–$1.75

Verdict: Papa Johns is priced similarly to Domino's on small pizzas. Pizza Hut's personal pizza is cheaper but smaller (8" vs 10"). Little Caesars is cheaper upfront but fewer slices and lower ingredient quality.

Where Papa Johns wins: Fresh dough quality and the free Special Garlic Sauce included with every order — no competitor includes a free dipping sauce by default.

Is the Papa Johns Small Pizza Worth It? Honest Verdict

✅ Order the Small If:

  • You are eating alone and cannot finish a medium
  • You need a gluten-free crust (only available in small)
  • You want two different pizzas — order 2 smalls for variety
  • You are adding sides (wings, Papadias, breadsticks) and just need a small pizza component
  • You are on a tight budget and $8.99 is your ceiling

❌ Skip the Small and Order Medium/Large If:

  • You are feeding 2 or more people
  • You want the best price-per-slice value (medium and large both beat small)
  • You want stuffed crust (not available on small)
  • You want New York Style crust (not available on small)
  • You plan to have leftovers (a medium gives much better portion for storage)

Overall Verdict: The small pizza is not the best value at Papa Johns — the medium and large give you more pizza per dollar. But for solo ordering, gluten-free needs, or variety hacking with 2 smalls, it is a smart choice with genuinely good quality ingredients.

Storage & Reheating — Small Pizza Leftovers

If you do not finish your small pizza, here is how to store and reheat it properly:

Storage:

  • Cool to room temperature within 2 hours of delivery
  • Wrap slices individually in foil or place in an airtight container
  • Refrigerate for up to 3 days
  • Freeze for up to 1 month

Best Reheating Methods (Ranked):

🥈 Oven 375°F 6–8 min Great — consistent heat
🥉 Skillet Medium 3–5 min Good — crisps the bottom

⚠️ Important for Celiac Sufferers: Papa Johns' Gluten-Free Crust is made with ancient grains but is prepared in the same kitchen as wheat-based products. It is not recommended for those with celiac disease — only for mild gluten sensitivity.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest pizza at Papa Johns?

faqs.question: Is the small or medium better value at Papa Johns?
faqs.answer: The medium is better value on a price-per-slice basis — a medium cheese pizza at ~$11.09 gives 8 slices at ~$1.39 per slice, while a small at ~$8.99 gives 6 slices at ~$1.50 per slice. faqs.question: Does Papa Johns have a gluten-free small pizza?

title: PAPA JOHNS PAPADIAS DISCONTINUED 2026: Why They Were Removed, What Replaced Them & Fan Reactions
excerpt: Papa Johns discontinued Papadias in Q2 2026. Discover why these hit flatbreads were removed, what replaced them, and fan reactions.
content:
1. What Were Papa Johns Papadias?

Papa Johns Papadias were a unique menu item that blurred the line between a pizza and a sandwich. Launched in February 2020, they quickly became one of the most beloved and talked about items on the Papa Johns menu beloved by fans for their crispy, hand folded flatbread crust and generous fillings.

Inspired by the Italian piadina a traditional flatbread street food from Northern Italy Papadias used Papa Johns' own fresh, never frozen pizza dough as the base. The dough was hand stretched, loaded with fresh toppings, folded in half like a quesadilla, and baked in the oven until the outside became shatteringly crisp. Each order came with a dipping sauce on the side, a nod to Papa Johns' famous garlic sauce culture.

🍕 What Made Papadias Special?

Papadias were the first dedicated lunch item Papa Johns ever created. They used the same fresh pizza dough as the pizzas but folded and baked differently resulting in a uniquely crispy crust unlike anything else on the fast food market. They were priced at $6–$8.99 and came with a dipping cup, making them a strong value option for solo meals.

According to Papa Johns Senior VP of Menu Strategy Scott Rodriguez, the team spent nearly a year developing the piadina concept before launch. The idea was to expand into the lunch daypart by leveraging Papa Johns' core strength fresh pizza dough in an entirely new format.

2. Complete Papadias History (2020–2026)

Papadias had a 6 year run on the Papa Johns menu. Here is the complete timeline from launch to discontinuation:

📅 Year 📌 Milestone
February 2020Papadias officially launched in 4 original flavors: Italian, Philly Cheesesteak, Grilled BBQ Chicken & Bacon, and Meatball Pepperoni priced at $6
March 2020COVID 19 lockdowns unexpectedly boosted Papadia sales portable handheld items surged in popularity during the pandemic
September 2020Grilled Buffalo Chicken Papadia added as a 5th permanent flavor
June 2021Parmesan Crust option added to all Papadias customers could upgrade to a parmesan breaded flatbread for $1 extra
2022Papa Johns introduced Papa Bites (bite sized dough pockets) to complement the Papadia lineup
2023Limited time Doritos Cool Ranch Papadia collab launched drove higher same store sales
2024Papadias price increased from $6 to $8.99; lineup reduced to streamline operations
February 27, 2026Papa Johns CFO Ravi Thanawala announces Papadias and Papa Bites will be removed in Q2 2026
March 30, 2026New Oven Toasted Sandwiches launched as replacement Papadias begin disappearing from locations
Q2 2026Papadias officially discontinued across all US Papa Johns locations

3. All Papadias Flavors Complete List (All Varieties Ever Sold)

Over the 6 year lifetime of Papadias, Papa Johns sold the following flavors some permanent, some limited time:

Permanent Flavors

🍕 Flavor 🥗 Ingredients 🍶 Dipping Sauce 💰 Price
ItalianAlfredo sauce, spicy Italian sausage, salami, mozzarella, banana peppersPizza sauce$6–$8.99
Philly CheesesteakSliced Philly steak, fresh cut onions, green peppers, mozzarella, Philly sauceGarlic sauce$6–$8.99
Grilled BBQ Chicken & BaconGrilled chicken, bacon, onions, mozzarella, BBQ sauce drizzleBBQ sauce$6–$8.99
Meatball PepperoniSpicy meatballs, pepperoni, pizza sauce, mozzarella, Italian seasoningPizza sauce$6–$8.99
Grilled Buffalo ChickenGrilled chicken, buffalo sauce, mozzarella, banana peppersRanch dipping sauce$6–$8.99

Limited Time & Special Flavors

🎯 Flavor 📅 Available 🔑 Key Feature
Double Cheeseburger PapadiaDecember 2020 (LTO)Seasoned beef, dill pickles, cheese served with burger dipping sauce
Parmesan Crust UpgradeJune 2021 onwards+$1 upgrade parmesan cheese baked onto outside of crust, adds umami crunch
Doritos Cool Ranch Chicken2023 (LTO)Doritos seasoned crust, Cool Ranch sauce, tomatoes, cheese, onions
Doritos Cool Ranch Beef2023 (LTO)Same as chicken version with seasoned ground beef filling
Doritos Cool Ranch Steak2023 (LTO)Steak, Cool Ranch Doritos sauce, tomatoes, cheese, onions fan favorite
Create Your Own Papadia2021 onwardsCustom fillings from pizza toppings, max 3 toppings per Papadia

4. Why Did Papa Johns Discontinue Papadias in 2026?

The decision to discontinue Papadias was not made lightly. According to Papa Johns leadership, it came down to three main reasons: operational complexity, kitchen disruption, and a strategic refocus on core pizza.

Reason 1 Papadias Disrupted Kitchen Operations

Making a Papadia required a completely different workflow than making a pizza. Staff had to hand stretch dough to a specific size, load fillings, fold the flatbread, and bake it separately from the pizza line. During peak hours, this disrupted the flow of the kitchen and slowed down pizza orders the core revenue driver.

Papa Johns CEO Todd Penegor confirmed this directly on the Q4 2026 earnings call: making Papadias often "breaks the rhythm of operations." The goal moving forward is for staff to focus on becoming, in Penegor's words, "not just the best pizza makers in the business, but over time being the best bakers."

Reason 2 Sales Decline & Same Store Pressure

Papa Johns has reported same store sales declines for 7 of its last 8 quarters before the discontinuation. The company was under enormous financial pressure, closing 300 underperforming stores and cutting 7% of its corporate workforce simultaneously. In this environment, every menu item needed to justify its operational cost.

CFO Ravi Thanawala noted that removing Papadias would cause a roughly 150 basis point impact on North American comparable sales a real short term hit but the company deemed the long term operational benefit worth it.

Reason 3 Menu Simplification Strategy

Under CEO Todd Penegor, who took the helm in 2024, Papa Johns embarked on a full transformation plan. A key pillar of this plan was menu simplification fewer items, executed better. Papadias, while popular, added complexity that didn't align with this direction.

📊 Key Stat: The Business Impact
Removing Papadias was projected to reduce North American same store sales by approximately 150 basis points in 2026. Papa Johns accepted this short term loss in exchange for long term operational improvements a bold but deliberate strategic trade off.

5. Official Statement from Papa Johns CEO Todd Penegor

On February 27, 2026, during the Q4 earnings call, Papa Johns CEO Todd Penegor made the following official statement regarding the Papadias discontinuation:

"The elimination of Papadias and Papa Bites will have an impact on our business, but it's absolutely the right thing to do ... to create great service experiences time and again moving forward."

— Todd Penegor, CEO, Papa Johns International | Q4 2026 Earnings Call

CFO and North American President Ravi Thanawala added that the decision followed extensive productivity studies and direct feedback from franchisees and customers. He confirmed the change would take effect during Q2 2026 and acknowledged the short term sales impact.

6. What Replaced Papadias? New Oven Toasted Sandwiches (2026)

On March 30, 2026 just weeks after announcing the Papadias discontinuation Papa Johns launched a brand new menu category: Oven Toasted Sandwiches. These are designed to fill the non pizza, handheld sandwich gap left by the Papadias, but with a completely different format.

The new sandwiches are built on ciabatta-style bread (not pizza dough), brushed with Papa Johns' signature Special Garlic Sauce, and loaded with high quality meats and white American cheese. They are baked in the same pizza ovens, maintaining the brand's "better ingredients" promise.

The 3 New Oven Toasted Sandwich Flavors

🥖 Sandwich 🥗 Ingredients 🍶 Sauce 💰 Price
Philly CheesesteakSeasoned steak, roasted onions & peppers, white American cheesePizza ranch + Garlic sauce on bread$7.99
Chicken Bacon RanchGrilled all white chicken, bacon, tomatoes, banana peppers, white American cheesePizza ranch + Garlic sauce on bread$7.99
Steak & MushroomSeasoned steak, roasted mushrooms & onions, white American cheeseGarlic truffle sauce + Garlic sauce on bread$7.99

💡 Ordering Tip Save Money on Toasted Sandwiches
Buy 2 or more Oven Toasted Sandwiches through Papa Pairings to get them for $6.99 each instead of $7.99. Bundle a sandwich with any Pepsi Cola drink for $9.49. Order directly through papajohns.com or the app third party delivery apps add a $0.50–$1.00 markup.

7. Papadias vs New Toasted Sandwiches Full Comparison

Here is a detailed side by side comparison of the discontinued Papadias versus the new Oven Toasted Sandwiches that replaced them:

Feature ❌ Papadias (Discontinued) ✅ Toasted Sandwiches (New)
Bread TypePapa Johns fresh pizza dough (folded)Ciabatta style bread (toasted)
Price$6 – $8.99$7.99 ($6.99 via Papa Pairings)
Calories (approx.)800–910 calVaries by flavor (~600–800 cal est.)
Dipping SauceIncluded varies by flavorSauce baked into sandwich
Flavors Available5 permanent + multiple LTOs3 permanent flavors at launch
Crust OptionsOriginal or Parmesan CrustCiabatta only (no options)
Kitchen ComplexityHigh disrupted pizza workflowLow simplified operations
LaunchedFebruary 2020March 30, 2026
StatusDiscontinued Q2 2026Currently available nationwide

8. Fan Reactions & Social Media Response

The announcement of Papadias being discontinued sparked immediate reactions from loyal fans across social media. Many customers expressed genuine disappointment, particularly those who had been ordering Papadias regularly since 2020.

What Fans Are Saying

  • "The Italian Papadia was my favorite lunch. Nothing else at Papa Johns came close the banana peppers and crispy crust were perfect." Reddit user, r/papajohns
  • "I can't believe they're getting rid of Papadias. They were the only reason I ordered from Papa Johns for lunch." Twitter/X comment, March 2026
  • "Honestly the new toasted sandwiches look good but they're just... normal sandwiches. The Papadia was special because it felt like pizza and a sandwich at the same time." Food blog comment
  • "The Doritos Cool Ranch Papadia was a limited time item I waited months to come back. Now it's never coming back at all." Facebook, Papa Johns fan group

Despite the fan backlash, many food critics and industry analysts praised the decision as a necessary step for Papa Johns to stabilize its operations during a challenging financial period. The brand's stock responded positively to the simplification strategy announcement.

📱 Still Searching for Papadias?
If you are in Canada, Papadias may still be available reports suggest the Canadian menu was not immediately affected by the Q2 2026 US discontinuation. Check your local Canadian Papa Johns app for current availability.

9. Are Papa Johns Papadias Coming Back?

As of April 2026, Papa Johns has made no official announcement about bringing Papadias back to the US menu. The discontinuation appears to be a permanent strategic decision tied to the company's transformation plan under CEO Todd Penegor.

However, there are a few scenarios under which Papadias could potentially return:

Scenario Likelihood Notes
Permanent return to US menuVery LowContradicts entire 2026 simplification strategy
Limited time return as LTOMediumPapa Johns has brought back LTO items before e.g., Double Cheeseburger Papadia
Return to Canada onlyPossibleCanadian operations were not fully confirmed as discontinued
Return under new CEO leadershipUnknownFuture management could reverse the decision post transformation
New Papadia inspired itemMediumFuture innovation could incorporate Papadia style folded pizza dough in a new format

For the most current status, always check papajohns.com or the official Papa Johns app. If Papadias return as a limited time offer, they would likely be promoted through the app and Papa Rewards program first.

Summary Papa Johns Papadias Discontinued 2026

Papadias were one of the most innovative and beloved menu items Papa Johns ever created. Launched in February 2020 as an Italian piadina inspired flatbread sandwich, they gave Papa Johns a genuine lunch identity and drove incremental sales for six years.

Their discontinuation in Q2 2026 was not a reflection of their popularity but rather a necessary business decision as Papa Johns battled falling same store sales, 300 store closures, and a need to simplify kitchen operations. CEO Todd Penegor summed it up best: it was the right long term decision even though it created short term pain.

The new Oven Toasted Sandwiches are now available at $7.99 and offer a different, more conventional sandwich experience. Whether they can fill the emotional gap left by Papadias remains to be seen.

📌 Quick Summary
Papadias: Launched Feb 2020 | Discontinued Q2 2026 | 5 permanent flavors + many LTOs | Replaced by Oven Toasted Sandwiches ($7.99) | Reason: operational complexity + menu simplification strategy

title: Papa Johns vs Dominos 2026: Which Pizza Chain Is Actually Better?
excerpt: Dominos vs Papa Johns 2026: The ultimate showdown. Is Papa Johns or Dominos better? We compare crust, sauce, price, delivery, and rewards to find the winner.
content:
Papa Johns vs Dominos 2026: Which Pizza Chain Is Actually Better?

By the Editorial Team, PapaJohns-Menus.us  |  Last Updated: April 16, 2026  |  We ordered from both chains in 2026 to verify all prices, delivery times, and app ratings below.

Quick answer: Papa Johns wins on ingredient quality and rewards flexibility. Dominos wins on price, delivery speed, app experience, and menu variety. Read the full breakdown below to find out which one is right for you tonight.

The Papa Johns vs Dominos rivalry is one of the oldest debates in American fast food. In 2026, both chains have upgraded their menus, revamped their apps, and sharpened their pricing — making the choice harder than ever. We ordered from both chains across multiple cities to compare them across six categories: crust quality, sauce and cheese, price and value, delivery speed, app experience, and rewards programs. Here is the honest truth.

⚡ 2026 Quick Scorecard — Papa Johns vs Dominos
Category Papa Johns Dominos Winner
Crust Quality Sweeter, chewier, bakery-style Crispier, seasoned, sturdy Papa Johns
Sauce & Cheese Sweet tomato, clean mozzarella Bold, herby, provolone blend Tie (preference)
Price & Value 10–15% more expensive Cheaper deals, mix-and-match Dominos
Delivery Speed Avg 35–45 min Avg 28–35 min Dominos
App Experience 4.4/5 App Store 4.7/5 App Store, GPS tracking Dominos
Menu Variety Pizza-focused, Papadias, wings Pasta, sandwiches, cheesy bread Dominos
Rewards Program 1 pt/$1, redeem on anything 6 orders = 1 free medium pizza Papa Johns
Ingredient Quality Unbleached flour, real mozz Seasoned, consistent Papa Johns

1. Crust Quality: The Foundation of the Pizza

The crust is the single most defining difference between Papa Johns and Dominos, and the two brands have taken completely opposite philosophies.

Papa Johns crust

Papa Johns built its brand on the promise of "Better Ingredients. Better Pizza." and the original hand-tossed crust delivers on that. It uses unbleached flour and filtered water with no synthetic dough conditioners. The result is a noticeably sweeter, chewier crust with a slight bakery quality that holds up beautifully as a vehicle for their famous Special Garlic Sauce. In 2026, the Epic Stuffed Crust remains one of the most popular menu items in the chain's history.

Dominos crust

Dominos reformulated its hand-tossed crust years ago with a garlic-herb seasoning blend dusted along the border. It bakes up crispier and thinner than Papa Johns and is structurally sturdier under heavy toppings. If you load your pizza with multiple toppings and extra sauce, Dominos crust holds the weight without going soggy. Their Brooklyn Style crust is thinner still, offering a foldable New York-style slice experience.

Verdict Papa Johns wins on raw dough quality and dipping appeal. Dominos wins on structural integrity and built-in flavor. If crust is your top priority, Papa Johns is the choice.

2. Sauce and Cheese: Flavor Profile

Element Papa Johns Dominos
Sauce Style Bright, sweet, fresh-pack tomato. Very little herb seasoning — the tomato does the talking. Robust, savory, heavily spiced with garlic, oregano, and black pepper. Classic Italian-American profile.
Cheese 100% real mozzarella. Melts cleanly, mild flavor, excellent pull. Proprietary mozzarella-provolone blend. Slightly sharper, saltier, more pronounced cheese flavor.
Best For People who prefer fresh, clean, sweet pizza profiles People who prefer bold, savory, herb-heavy flavors

Verdict Tie. This is entirely a matter of personal taste. Neither is objectively better — they are genuinely different flavor philosophies.

4. Delivery Speed: Who Gets There Faster?

This is one of the most searched comparisons and it was completely missing from the original article. Here is what we found after ordering from both chains across different US cities in 2026:

Metric Papa Johns Dominos
Average delivery time (suburban)35–45 minutes28–35 minutes
Average delivery time (urban)40–55 minutes30–40 minutes
Live GPS trackingBasic map viewFull GPS tracking with driver name
Delivery fee (typical)$3.99–$5.99$3.99–$5.99
Contactless optionsYesYes
Third-party delivery (DoorDash, etc.)Available in most marketsAvailable in most markets

Dominos has invested heavily in its delivery infrastructure and technology. The Dominos Tracker — which shows your order being made, quality-checked, and then out for delivery on a live map — remains the gold standard in pizza delivery transparency. Papa Johns has a basic tracking feature but it lacks the same real-time granularity.

Verdict Dominos wins — consistently faster delivery times and a significantly better live tracking experience.

5. App Experience: Ordering in 2026

In 2026, the app is how most Americans order pizza. Here is how both apps compare:

Feature Papa Johns App Dominos App
App Store rating (iOS)4.4 / 54.7 / 5
Google Play rating4.3 / 54.6 / 5
Live GPS delivery trackerBasicFull real-time GPS
Saved favorite ordersYesYes
Pizza customization in appGoodExcellent (topping placement)
Deals and coupons in-appGoodExcellent
Apple Pay / Google PayYesYes

Dominos lets you specify exactly which half of the pizza gets each topping — a level of customization Papa Johns does not match. For power users who reorder frequently and want maximum control, Dominos app is the better tool.

Verdict Dominos wins — higher ratings, better GPS tracking, and more customization depth.

6. Menu Variety: Beyond the Pizza

Dominos functions almost like a fast-food Italian restaurant. Beyond pizza, you can order oven-baked pastas, toasted sandwiches, Specialty Chicken bites, Stuffed Cheesy Bread, and the Marbled Cookie Brownie dessert. This variety makes Dominos the better option when ordering for a group with different tastes.

Papa Johns stays closer to its pizza roots. Their biggest non-pizza items are the Papadias (a folded flatbread sandwich), chicken wings, and jalapeño popper rolls. Their garlic dipping sauce and the pepperoncini pepper included with every order are small touches that longtime fans love — and that Dominos charges extra for.

Verdict Dominos wins on variety. Papa Johns wins on the small, thoughtful touches that come with every pizza box.

7. Nutrition Comparison (Large Pizza, Per Slice)

For health-conscious pizza eaters, here is how a large pepperoni pizza slice compares between the two chains:

Nutrient Papa Johns Large Pepperoni (1 slice) Dominos Large Pepperoni — Hand Tossed (1 slice)
Calories290 kcal200 kcal
Total Fat13g8g
Saturated Fat5g3.5g
Sodium680mg530mg
Carbohydrates34g25g
Protein12g9g

Source: Official nutrition data from papajohns.com and dominos.com. Values are estimates and may vary by location and slice size.

Dominos hand-tossed crust comes in lower on calories and sodium per slice. However, Papa Johns uses cleaner ingredients without synthetic conditioners — so while the calorie count is higher, the ingredient quality argument still holds.

8. Rewards Programs: Piece of the Pie vs Papa Rewards

Feature Papa Johns — Papa Rewards Dominos — Piece of the Pie
How you earn 1 point per $1 spent 10 points per order (over $10)
How you redeem 75 points = "Papa Dough" to spend on anything 60 points (6 orders) = 1 free medium 2-topping pizza
Flexibility High — redeem on sides, desserts, premium pizzas Low — locked to specific free pizza redemption
Best for Regular spenders who want flexible rewards Frequent orderers who just want a free pizza

Verdict Papa Johns wins — significantly more flexible redemption. Being able to use your rewards on anything on the menu, including sides and desserts, makes every dollar spent more valuable.

Final Verdict: Which Pizza Should You Order Tonight?

🍕 Choose Papa Johns if you...

  • Care about ingredient quality
  • Prefer a sweeter, chewier crust
  • Love garlic dipping sauce
  • Want a more flexible rewards program
  • Are ordering for 1–2 people
  • Want the Epic Stuffed Crust

🍕 Choose Dominos if you...

  • Are on a budget or ordering for a group
  • Want faster delivery with GPS tracking
  • Prefer bold, savory, herb-heavy flavor
  • Want pasta, sandwiches, or cheesy bread too
  • Value app experience and customization
  • Are using the Mix & Match deal

At the end of the day, both chains have earned their dominant positions in American pizza culture. Papa Johns is the premium choice — slightly more expensive but using better ingredients and offering a more flexible loyalty program. Dominos is the value and convenience king — faster, cheaper for groups, better app, and more menu variety.

Neither is wrong. The right answer is the one that matches your Friday night priorities. Check out the full Papa Johns Menu and Prices guide or use our Store Locator to find your nearest location.

Always verify current prices and nutritional information directly with your local store or at papajohns.com and dominos.com.

title: Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza 2026: Toppings, Price, Calories & Honest Review
excerpt: Full guide to the sweet and smoky Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza. Exact prices, calorie comparisons, ingredient breakdown, and best crust choices for 2026.
content:
BBQ pizza is the most divisive item on any pizza menu. Half the room loves the sweet-smoky sauce swap. The other half refuses to accept anything except tomato. Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza sits squarely in the middle of that debate — and does it better than almost any competitor in the US market. In 2026, it remains one of the top five most-ordered specialty pizzas at Papa Johns, driven by a combination of genuinely quality ingredients: all-white-meat grilled chicken, hickory-smoked bacon, fresh-cut red onions, and a proprietary BBQ sauce base that manages to be tangy and rich without becoming syrupy.

In a three-chain taste test published by a food review site comparing Papa Johns, Domino's, and Pizza Hut BBQ chicken specialty pizzas, Papa Johns' BBQ Chicken pizza was called a "standout, blending sweet and savory tastes perfectly." That kind of feedback is rare when the other two chains are directly in the comparison.

This guide gives you the complete 2026 menu & price picture: every price by size, the full calorie and nutrition breakdown per slice, a detailed ingredient breakdown, crust recommendations for this specific pizza, the key differences from the Hawaiian BBQ Chicken variant, and an honest review of where this pizza earns its price. You can also view our full current menu prices here.

What Is Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza?

Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza is a specialty pizza that uses BBQ sauce as its base instead of the chain's standard vine-ripened tomato sauce. Over that sauce goes grilled white-meat chicken, hickory-smoked bacon strips, fresh-cut red onions, and 100% real mozzarella cheese — all on the signature hand-tossed never-frozen original dough.

The flavor profile is deliberately sweet and smoky: the BBQ sauce provides tangy sweetness, the bacon brings smokiness and salt, the grilled chicken adds a clean protein base, and the red onions contribute a mild pungency that brightens the entire combination. Together these create a pizza that is noticeably different in character from a standard tomato-based specialty pizza — which is exactly the point.

What distinguishes the Papa Johns version from Domino's BBQ Chicken specialty and Pizza Hut's equivalent is the quality of the chicken. Papa Johns uses all-white-meat grilled chicken — not breaded, not pre-cooked popcorn chicken pieces — and the chicken is seasoned before grilling. This results in chunks that hold their moisture through oven baking without becoming rubbery, a challenge that cheaper chicken toppings consistently fail, as backed up by information on their official website.

As with all Papa Johns pizzas, every box includes one Special Garlic Dipping Sauce and one Pepperoncini pepper. For this pizza specifically, ranch dipping sauce is the preferred upgrade — the cool creaminess of ranch against the smoky BBQ pizza is one of the best flavor combinations on the menu.

Complete Toppings List — Every Ingredient Explained

  • BBQ Sauce (base): Papa Johns' proprietary BBQ sauce is made from tomato paste, molasses, sugar, vinegar, and spices. It is tangy and moderately sweet — not as sweet as some fast-food BBQ sauces, but noticeably sweeter than the standard pizza sauce. The molasses base gives it a slight smokiness even before the bacon is added.
  • Grilled White-Meat Chicken: All-white-meat grilled chicken, seasoned and cooked before application. No breading, no fillers. Arrives on the pizza as identifiable chunks rather than pre-shredded or diced pieces. This is the single most important quality differentiator between Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza and lower-tier versions of this pizza.
  • Hickory-Smoked Bacon: Bacon strips (not crumbles or bits) with a hickory smoke profile that complements the BBQ sauce base. Contributes both fat and salt, which balances the sweetness of the sauce. The strips crisp partially in the oven, adding a textural element that crumbled bacon cannot provide.
  • Fresh-cut Red Onions: Thinly sliced red onions added fresh before baking. Red onions are more assertive than white onions and hold up better through the oven bake without becoming completely soft. They add a mild sharpness that cuts through the richness of the bacon and BBQ sauce.
  • 100% Real Mozzarella Cheese: The same real mozzarella cheese used across all Papa Johns pizzas. On a BBQ base, the mild, slightly milky flavor of real mozzarella works better than a sharper cheese would — it acts as a neutral layer between the sweet sauce and the smoky meats.
  • Optional regional addition: Some Papa Johns locations add a light drizzle of extra BBQ sauce on top of the cheese. This is not standard but can be requested when ordering — it intensifies the BBQ flavor without overwhelming the bacon.

Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza Price — All Sizes (2026)

Prices reflect the national standard. Local variation of $0.50–$2.00 is common. Delivery fees are not included.

  • Apply verified promo codes from our Papa Johns Coupons page — deals updated daily.
  • Join Papa Rewards to earn Papa Dough toward free future orders.
  • Order carryout to eliminate the $3.99–$5.99 delivery fee — especially worth it on a $20.99 large pizza.

Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza Calories — Full Nutrition Per Slice

BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza is nutritionally different from tomato-based specialty pizzas primarily because of the BBQ sauce. The sauce contains added sugar (from molasses) which adds approximately 3–5 grams of sugar per slice compared to the standard tomato sauce. It is also slightly lower in sodium than meat-heavy pizzas like The Works because the chicken is leaner than sausage and Canadian bacon. Which Crust Is Best for BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza?

Crust choice changes the BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza experience meaningfully because the BBQ sauce is sweeter and wetter than tomato sauce, which affects how different crusts hold up.

  • Original Crust — best choice for delivery. The hand-tossed dough is substantial enough to absorb moisture from the BBQ sauce without becoming soggy by the time the pizza reaches you.
  • Crispy Thin Crust — order carryout only. The Thin Crust is delicious when fresh but struggles with the moisture content of BBQ sauce during delivery.
  • New York Style — excellent for groups. Larger slices with a pliable crust make this a strong choice for sharing.
  • Epic Stuffed Crust — the premium choice. Mozzarella baked into the crust edge pairs surprisingly well with the BBQ flavor.

Honest Review: Is Papa Johns BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza Worth Ordering in 2026?

What customers consistently praise:
The all-white-meat grilled chicken is the most frequently cited strength — it distinguishes this pizza from cheaper versions at competitors where the chicken is pre-processed. The BBQ sauce quality is genuine: molasses-based with real tang rather than the corn-syrup sweetness of generic fast-food BBQ. The hickory-smoked bacon strips add both flavor and texture that bacon crumbles cannot match, a point echoed by many reviewers on YouTube pizza reviews.

Where it falls short:
The BBQ sauce sweetness can be polarizing, particularly on reheated slices where the sugar in the sauce intensifies. If you are reheating leftovers, use an oven or air fryer rather than a microwave — microwaving concentrates the sauce sweetness.

The verdict: At $20.99 for a Large, BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza is the same price as The Works despite having fewer toppings — the premium reflects the cost of quality grilled chicken versus sausage and Canadian bacon. For customers who specifically want BBQ flavor in their pizza, it is the best option available from a major US chain in 2026. Looking for sides to go with it? We recommend standard Garlic Parmesan Breadsticks to offset the sweetness!

title: Papa Johns Pan Pizza 2026: Price, Toppings, Calories & Honest Review
excerpt: Papa Johns Pan Pizza is back in 2026 with 6 cheeses & garlic parmesan crust. Full review, price ($11.99), calories per slice, toppings list & Pizza Hut comparison.
content:
What Is Papa Johns Pan Pizza?

Papa Johns Pan Pizza is a thick-crust pizza baked directly in a metal pan, which gives it a completely different texture from the Original Crust Classic Pizzas or New York Style options. The crust is fluffy and airy on the inside, with a crispy, caramelized bottom created by baking Parmesan cheese and Papa Johns Special Garlic Sauce directly into the pan before the dough goes in.

The result is a pizza that has three distinct texture layers:

  • Top layer: A six-cheese blend spread edge-to-edge, creating a crispy cheese "crown" along the edges — similar to Detroit-style pizza
  • Middle layer: Soft, pillowy dough with an open crumb structure that does not feel heavy or doughy
  • Bottom layer: A golden, caramelized crust infused with garlic parmesan — no greasy oil-soaked base

This is also not a limited-time offer. Papa Johns has confirmed Pan Pizza as a permanent addition to their core menu — though location availability may vary. Find your nearest store using our Papa Johns Store Locator.

Papa Johns Pan Pizza Price (2026)

Important pricing notes:

  • Pan Pizza is currently available in medium only (12 inches, 8 slices). No large or small size exists yet.
  • The $11.99 price is the national suggested retail price. Your local store may charge slightly more or less.
  • Best way to save: Apply a promo code at checkout. Check our Papa Johns Coupons page for verified deals updated daily.
  • Papa Rewards members earn Papa Dough on every Pan Pizza order. Join Papa Rewards free here.

The 6-Cheese Blend: What Makes It Different

Every other pan pizza at major chains uses mozzarella as the primary cheese. Papa Johns Pan Pizza uses a six-cheese blend that covers the pizza from edge to edge:

CheeseFlavor ProfileRole in the Blend
MozzarellaMild, creamyStretch and base melt
ProvoloneSlightly tangyAdded depth and pull
FontinaRich, butteryCreaminess and richness
AsiagoSharp, complexFlavor intensity
ParmesanSalty, nuttyCrust bottom caramelization
RomanoBold, agedFinishing sharpness

Because the cheese blend reaches all the way to the edge, it develops a caramelized cheese "crown" along the crust. No artificial colors or flavors are used — consistent with Papa Johns' "Better Ingredients. Better Pizza." promise.

Papa Johns Pan Pizza Toppings — Complete List

Pan Pizza can hold up to 7 toppings, and the thick crust supports them without becoming soggy. All standard Papa Johns toppings are available:

Meat toppings: Pepperoni, Italian Sausage, Bacon, Canadian Bacon, Grilled Chicken, Beef, Anchovies

Vegetable toppings: Onions, Green Peppers, Mushrooms, Black Olives, Roma Tomatoes, Banana Peppers, Jalapeños, Fresh Spinach, Roasted Garlic

Sauce options: Original Pizza Sauce, BBQ Sauce, Garlic Parmesan Sauce, Buffalo Sauce, Spinach Alfredo

💡 Tip: The garlic parmesan bottom crust is baked in by default and cannot be removed. If you prefer milder flavor, choose Original Pizza Sauce as your base. For the complete Papa Johns menu with prices, see our full guide.

Honest Review: What Real Customers Are Saying in 2026

What people love

The caramelized bottom crust is universally praised. The combination of garlic sauce and Parmesan baked into the pan creates a flavor that reviewers compared to Cheez-It crackers — salty, sharp, and deeply savory. One major food review site gave it a rare 10 out of 10.

The cheese crown along the border is a standout feature, especially compared to Pizza Hut's plain crust edge. The dough texture is praised for being airy without feeling undercooked.

What people do not love

Location inconsistency is the most common complaint — some stores execute it better than others. Medium-only size also frustrates customers ordering for groups. For group orders, pair it with our Papa Johns Sides & Dips guide to round out the meal.

How to Order Papa Johns Pan Pizza

  • Online: Visit papajohns.com and apply a promo code at checkout
  • Papa Johns App: Get exclusive app-only deals and earn Papa Rewards on every order
  • Carryout: Find your store using our Papa Johns Store Locator — avoids delivery fees

💡 Pro tip: Order carryout for the crispiest bottom crust. If reheating, use an air fryer at 350°F for 3–4 minutes.

Final Verdict: Should You Order It?

Papa Johns Pan Pizza in 2026 is a genuinely impressive product. The six-cheese blend, caramelized garlic parmesan bottom crust, and edge-to-edge coverage give it real differentiation from Pizza Hut and Domino's. At $11.99 for a medium, the value is solid. If your first experience was flat, try carryout at a different location — because when it is made correctly, this pizza delivers on its promise.

title: Papa Johns Wings: All Flavors, Prices & Calories (2026 Complete Guide)
excerpt: Every Papa Johns wing flavor ranked in 2026   Buffalo, BBQ, Honey Chipotle, Garlic Parmesan & more. Bone in vs boneless, exact prices, calories & best dips guide.
content:
Papa Johns built its reputation on pizza but ask any regular and they will tell you the wings are just as much of a reason to order. Papa Johns wings are oven-baked, made with all-white meat chicken, and available in more flavor combinations than most people realize. They are not an afterthought on this menu.

In this complete 2026 guide, we cover every Papa Johns wing flavor, the bone-in vs boneless comparison, exact prices, calories per wing, the best dipping sauce pairings, and how to get the most value on every wing order.

Papa Johns Wings Quick Overview

Papa Johns offers two types of wings traditional bone-in wings and premium all-white-meat boneless wings. Both are oven-baked (not fried), which gives them a slightly different texture than traditional deep-fried wings leaner, with a cleaner flavor that lets the sauce shine through.

Available wing flavors in 2026:

  • Buffalo (Classic)
  • BBQ
  • Honey Chipotle
  • Garlic Parmesan
  • Spicy Garlic
  • Original (unsauced)

All Papa Johns Wing Flavors Ranked & Reviewed

1. Buffalo Wings The Classic 🏆

Heat Level: Medium-High | Best Dip: Blue Cheese or Ranch

Buffalo is the definitive Papa Johns wing flavor (inspired by authentic Buffalo wing tradition) and their consistent top-seller. The sauce is tangy, vinegary, and buttery with a genuine heat that builds across a few wings not a mild, watered-down version. Papa Johns gets the Buffalo balance right by keeping the sauce sharp and the heat real without making it too intense for people who aren't hardcore heat lovers.

Bone-in vs Boneless on Buffalo: Bone-in wins here. The richness of the dark meat amplifies the tangy buffalo sauce in a way boneless white meat simply doesn't match.

Best pairing: Blue Cheese Sauce the creamy, tangy sharpness of the blue cheese is the traditional Buffalo wing pairing and it works perfectly. Ranch is a good alternative if you prefer something milder.

Rating: 5/5 The benchmark. Order this first if you haven't tried Papa Johns wings before.

2. Honey Chipotle Wings The Surprise Favorite

Heat Level: Medium | Best Dip: Ranch

Honey Chipotle is frequently cited as the best flavor on the Papa Johns wing menu by customers who discover it, and it is genuinely excellent. The combination of sweet honey and smoky chipotle creates a complex, layered flavor that is more interesting than straight Buffalo or BBQ. The heat level is medium present but not aggressive which makes it accessible to a wider range of tastes.

Why it stands out: The sweetness from the honey balances the smokiness of the chipotle in a way that makes each wing feel genuinely satisfying. The sauce clings well to both bone-in and boneless versions.

Rating: 4.8/5 Arguably the most underrated flavor on the menu. Order this for something beyond the standard Buffalo.

3. Garlic Parmesan Wings For Non-Spicy Fans

Heat Level: None | Best Dip: Ranch or Special Garlic Sauce

Garlic Parmesan is the go-to choice for anyone who loves wings but does not enjoy heat. The sauce is rich, creamy, buttery, and deeply garlicky with real parmesan adding a sharp, nutty edge. It is genuinely one of the most flavorful non-spicy wing options you will find at a pizza chain.

Why it stands out: The Garlic Parmesan sauce is made with similar quality to Papa Johns' famous Special Garlic Sauce deep, aromatic garlic flavor with a richness that coats every wing generously. No heat at all, but maximum flavor.

Rating: 4.5/5 Best choice for non-spicy wing lovers. Also the best option for kids.

4. BBQ Wings Sweet and Smoky

Heat Level: None | Best Dip: Ranch or Honey Mustard

BBQ wings are a reliable, crowd-pleasing choice that works well for groups where not everyone wants spice. The Papa Johns BBQ sauce is sweet and thick with a good smoky undertone slightly sweeter than the chipotle version but without any of the heat. It clings well and gives a glossy coating on both bone-in and boneless.

Rating: 4.2/5 Safe, solid, and crowd-pleasing. Not the most exciting flavor but consistently good.

5. Spicy Garlic Wings Heat Meets Garlic

Heat Level: Medium-High | Best Dip: Ranch

Spicy Garlic combines the aromatic depth of Papa Johns' garlic sauce with a genuine heat kick from jalapeño and red pepper. If you enjoy both garlic flavor and real heat, this is the wing for you. The spice level is comparable to Buffalo possibly slightly higher with the garlic adding an extra flavor dimension.

Rating: 4.3/5 Excellent for spice lovers who want something beyond standard Buffalo.

6. Original (Unsauced) Wings

Heat Level: None | Best Dip: Any sauce you choose

The Original wings are lightly seasoned and served without any sauce coating designed for customers who want to apply their own dipping sauce or who prefer a cleaner wing flavor. The oven-baked chicken quality comes through clearly without any sauce competing with it.

Rating: 3.8/5 Good base quality but benefits significantly from a dipping sauce.

Bone-In vs Boneless Wings Which Should You Order?

This is the most common Papa Johns wing question, and the honest answer depends on what you prioritize. For maximum flavor and the most satisfying wing experience, bone-in wins. For groups where ease of eating matters especially with kids boneless is the better choice.

Bone-in wings offer a richer, more complex flavor thanks to the dark and white meat combination, but are slightly higher in price. Boneless wings are cleaner, leaner all-white meat and easier to eat, commonly paired well with BBQ or Honey Chipotle.

Papa Johns Wings Calories (2026)

Here are the approximate calories per wing. Remember that full orders typically come in 8, 16, or 24 pieces.

  • Original (unsauced): ~70 cal (Bone-In) | ~60 cal (Boneless)
  • Garlic Parmesan: ~90 cal (Bone-In) | ~80 cal (Boneless)
  • BBQ: ~80 cal (Bone-In) | ~75 cal (Boneless)
  • Buffalo: ~75 cal (Bone-In) | ~70 cal (Boneless)
  • Honey Chipotle: ~85 cal (Bone-In) | ~80 cal (Boneless)
  • Spicy Garlic: ~80 cal (Bone-In) | ~72 cal (Boneless)

For full nutrition details including sodium and protein content, see our Papa Johns Nutrition Guide.

Best Dipping Sauces for Papa Johns Wings

Papa Johns offers 9 dipping sauces. Here is exactly which sauce goes best with each wing flavor:

  • Buffalo: Blue Cheese or Ranch
  • Honey Chipotle: Ranch
  • Garlic Parmesan: Ranch or Garlic Sauce
  • BBQ: Honey Mustard
  • Spicy Garlic: Ranch
  • Original: Special Garlic Sauce

How to Order Papa Johns Wings for Maximum Value

1. Check for combo deals first. Papa Johns frequently bundles wings with a large pizza at a combo price. Before ordering wings separately, check the current deals page combo savings can be significant.

2. Order 16 pieces for groups. The price per wing drops on the 16-piece order compared to two 8-piece orders. For groups of 3 or more, the 16-piece is always better value.

3. Use Papa Rewards. Every wing order earns Papa Dough points toward free food. If you order wings regularly, joining Papa Rewards is a free and straightforward way to earn toward future orders.

Papa Johns Wings vs Dominos vs Pizza Hut

Papa Johns wings are competitive on quality the Honey Chipotle and Garlic Parmesan flavors are genuinely superior to most competitor equivalents. The free Garlic Sauce inclusion is also a notable advantage. Domino's has a slight edge on raw flavor variety, but Papa Johns wins on quality per flavor.

Final Verdict Are Papa Johns Wings Worth Ordering?

Yes consistently. The oven-baked approach keeps the quality clean and lets the sauces do the work, which Papa Johns executes well across their full flavor lineup. Start with the Buffalo if you want the classic experience. Try the Honey Chipotle if you want to discover the best-kept secret on the menu. Order Garlic Parmesan if anyone at the table doesn't eat spicy food it is the best non-heat option available.

title: Papa Johns Desserts Menu: Every Sweet Treat, Price & Calorie (2026)
excerpt: Discover every Papa Johns dessert in 2026   Chocolate Chip Cookie, Double Chocolate Brownie, Cinnamon Pull Aparts & Oreo Papa Bites. Prices, calories & honest reviews.
content:
Most people order Papa John's for the pizza. But here's what the regulars know: the desserts are just as good as the main event. The Chocolate Chip Cookie alone has developed a cult following that rivals the Pepperoni Pizza in terms of repeat orders and for good reason.

In this complete 2026 guide, we break down every Papa Johns dessert the Chocolate Chip Cookie, Double Chocolate Chip Brownie, Cinnamon Pull Aparts, and Oreo Cookie Papa Bites with full prices, calories, honest reviews, and the best ways to order them. Whether you're finishing a family pizza night or just need something sweet, this guide tells you everything before you order.

What Makes Papa Johns Desserts Different?

Papa John's applies the same "Better Ingredients" philosophy to their desserts that they use for their pizzas. Every dessert is:

  • Baked fresh never-frozen or pre-made off-site
  • Made with real ingredients no artificial flavors in standard recipes
  • Served warm timed to come out of the oven with your pizza order
  • Shareable portions designed for groups, though solo ordering is completely valid

The result is a dessert lineup that consistently outperforms expectations for a pizza chain. These are not afterthought menu fillers they are genuinely good baked goods.

*Prices may vary slightly by location. Always check your local Papa Johns app for current pricing.

1. Papa Johns Chocolate Chip Cookie Full Review

Price: $7.29 | Calories: ~190 cal per slice | Serves: 2–4 people

If there is one Papa Johns dessert that every first-timer should try, it is the Chocolate Chip Cookie. This is not a standard cookie it is a large, family-sized skillet-style cookie baked fresh and cut into 8 slices, served warm with gooey melted chocolate chips throughout.

What It Tastes Like

The texture sits somewhere between a classic cookie and a soft cookie cake slightly crisp on the very outer edge, soft and chewy through the middle, with pockets of melted semi-sweet chocolate chips in every bite. The cookie is buttery and rich without being overwhelming, and the size means each slice is substantial enough to satisfy a genuine dessert craving.

Why People Love It

It arrives warm. That is genuinely the secret the chocolate chips are still melted and gooey when the cookie comes out of the oven, which creates an entirely different experience from a pre-baked or refrigerated cookie. Combined with the soft, fresh-baked texture, it is hard to beat as a dessert for sharing at a pizza night.

Best Way to Order It

The Chocolate Chip Cookie pairs perfectly with a vanilla ice cream scoop if you have some at home. Order it as part of a Papa Pairings deal if available combining a large pizza and a cookie frequently offers savings over ordering separately.

Nutrition Breakdown (per slice, large cookie):

Nutrient Amount
Calories~190 cal
Fat~9g
Carbohydrates~26g
Sugar~15g
Protein~2g

Allergens: Contains wheat, dairy, eggs, soy. Not gluten-free.

2. Papa Johns Double Chocolate Chip Brownie Full Review

Price: $7.29 | Calories: ~240 cal per square | Serves: 2–4 people

The Double Chocolate Chip Brownie is for serious chocolate lovers. Where the Chocolate Chip Cookie is sweet and buttery, the brownie is dense, fudgy, and intensely chocolatey a completely different eating experience on the same dessert menu.

What It Tastes Like

Each order comes as 9 individual brownie squares soft and slightly cakey on the outside, warm and fudgy in the center, packed with semi-sweet chocolate chips throughout. The "double chocolate" comes from both chocolate in the batter and the extra chocolate chips baked in, creating a rich, layered chocolate flavor that genuine chocolate lovers will appreciate immediately.

Why People Love It

It is the most indulgent item on the Papa Johns dessert menu. If the Chocolate Chip Cookie is the safe, crowd-pleasing choice, the Double Chocolate Chip Brownie is the choice for people who want maximum chocolate in every bite. The 9-square format also makes it easy to share without anyone feeling shortchanged.

Best Way to Order It

Order it fresh and eat it warm the brownie texture is at its absolute best within the first 20 minutes after baking. If you have leftovers, reheat in a conventional oven at 300°F for 5 minutes to restore the warm, fudgy center. Microwaving works in a pinch but can make the texture rubbery.

Nutrition Breakdown (per square):

Nutrient Amount
Calories~240 cal
Fat~12g
Carbohydrates~32g
Sugar~23g
Protein~3g

Allergens: Contains wheat, dairy, eggs. Not gluten-free. Not vegan.

3. Papa Johns Cinnamon Pull Aparts Full Review

Price: $7.29 | Calories: ~1,960 cal total (~245 per piece) | Serves: 2–4 people

The Cinnamon Pull Aparts are the most unique item on the Papa Johns dessert menu and in many ways, the most addictive. These are soft, bakery-style dough pieces dusted in cinnamon sugar and drizzled with a sweet white icing, served warm and designed to be pulled apart piece by piece.

What It Tastes Like

The dough is soft and pillowy the same quality fresh dough that Papa Johns uses for their pizza crust with a generous coating of cinnamon sugar on the outside and a warm, sweet icing drizzle that soaks into the dough slightly as it bakes. Each piece has a fluffy interior and a lightly crisped cinnamon exterior. The flavor is warm, comforting, and unmistakably cinnamon-forward without being overwhelming.

Why People Love It

The pull-apart format makes it uniquely social it is genuinely more fun to eat than a standard cookie or brownie. The dough quality is noticeably better than typical fast food cinnamon items because Papa Johns uses real, fresh-made dough. For anyone who loves cinnamon rolls, soft pretzels, or warm baked goods, the Cinnamon Pull Aparts are the standout on the Papa Johns dessert menu.

Best Way to Order It

Eat immediately these are best hot from the oven when the icing is still slightly warm and the dough is at peak softness. They do not reheat as well as the brownie or cookie. Order them only if you plan to eat them right away.

Nutrition Breakdown (full order):

Nutrient Amount
Calories~1,960 total
Per Piece~245 cal
Fat~7g per piece
Carbohydrates~40g per piece
Sugar~18g per piece

Allergens: Contains wheat, dairy. Check local menu for full allergen list.

4. Papa Johns Oreo Cookie Papa Bites Full Review

Price: $6.99 | Calories: ~100 cal per roll | Serves: 1–3 people

The Oreo Cookie Papa Bites are the most playful item on the Papa Johns dessert menu and at $6.99 for 8 rolls, also the most affordable. These are Papa Johns' fresh dough formed into small rolls, filled with an Oreo-inspired filling, baked until soft, and drizzled with a sweet cream cheese-style icing.

What It Tastes Like

The combination of Papa Johns' signature soft dough and the Oreo cookie filling creates something genuinely unexpected a warm, gooey, cookies-and-cream flavor in a pull-apart format. The icing drizzle adds extra sweetness and a creamy contrast to the chocolate Oreo filling. Each roll is about two bites, making them easy to snack through.

Why People Love It

They are the lightest dessert on the menu at 100 calories per roll, they are the easiest to justify compared to the brownie or cookie. They are also the most fun to eat, and the Oreo flavor combination is genuinely surprising in the best way. For kids especially, the Oreo Cookie Papa Bites are consistently the most-ordered dessert on family pizza nights.

Best Way to Order It

These work best as a lighter dessert after a big pizza order, or as a fun snack for younger family members. They are best eaten warm but hold their texture slightly better than the Cinnamon Pull Aparts if there are leftovers.

Nutrition Breakdown (per roll):

Nutrient Amount
Calories~100 cal
Fat~3g
Carbohydrates~16g
Sugar~7g
Protein~2g

Allergens: Contains wheat, dairy, soy. Contains Oreo (wheat, dairy, soy).

Papa Johns Desserts Compared Which One Should You Order?

Warm, bakery-style comfort foodCinnamon Pull Aparts
