This is highly recommended in cities like Atlanta, GA and Baltimore, MD.

How to get Garlic Knots cheaper:

  • Use the Papa Pairings deal — order Garlic Knots with any other qualifying item (Papadia, wings, dessert, or pizza) for $6.99 each, which makes the Garlic Knots effectively a discount side
  • Apply a promo code from our Papa Johns Coupons page — bundle deals regularly include sides
  • Earn Papa Dough through Papa Rewards and redeem toward free sides including Garlic Knots
  • Order carryout — delivery fees on a $6.99 item add up proportionally more than on a large pizza. Check store hours first.

Papa Johns Garlic Knots Calories — Full Nutrition Breakdown

Understanding the calorie structure of Garlic Knots requires knowing how Papa Johns measures them. The standard serving size is one knot (approximately 36g / 1.3 oz), and an order contains eight knots. The pizza sauce dipping cup adds approximately 30–45 additional calories and is not included in the per-knot figures below.

Calorie context: At 110 calories per knot, Papa Johns Garlic Knots are one of the more calorie-efficient sides on the menu. For comparison, a single slice of Large Pepperoni Pizza (Original Crust) is approximately 300–320 calories — meaning three Garlic Knots have roughly the same calorie count as one pizza slice. For a party of four sharing an order with a pizza, two or three knots per person is a reasonable addition without a significant calorie impact.

Smart ordering for calorie management:

  • Stick to the included pizza sauce for dipping (only ~30 cal) instead of upgrading to Special Garlic Sauce (~150 cal) — this saves 120 calories per dipping cup
  • Eat Garlic Knots fresh from the box — they are most satisfying hot, which encourages slower eating
  • Order Garlic Knots as a shared starter rather than an individual side to naturally moderate portions
  • The Buffalo Dipping Sauce ($0.85 extra) at only ~45 calories is the best low-calorie upgrade if you want more than the standard pizza sauce

For the full Papa Johns nutrition data across all menu items, visit our Papa Johns Nutrition Guide.

Complete Ingredient & Allergen Information

Dough ingredients: Enriched wheat flour, water, sugar, soybean oil, salt, yeast. The same six-ingredient fresh dough used in every Papa Johns pizza crust. Made daily at store locations like Washington, DC and Dallas, TX.

Garlic Parmesan Seasoning: Garlic powder, Parmesan cheese (pasteurized milk, cheese cultures, salt, enzymes, powdered cellulose), butter, Italian herb blend (oregano, basil, thyme), salt.

Allergens: Contains wheat (gluten), milk (from Parmesan), soy (from soybean oil in dough). No eggs, no nuts in the standard preparation. Cross-contact with other allergens is possible. Contact us for more details.

Are Garlic Knots vegetarian? Yes. There are no meat ingredients in Papa Johns Garlic Knots — the dough, seasoning, and Parmesan are all vegetarian. The included pizza sauce is also vegetarian.

Are Garlic Knots vegan? No. The garlic parmesan seasoning contains dairy from the Parmesan cheese and butter. The dough is vegan-friendly, but the coating is not.

Are Garlic Knots gluten-free? No. The dough is wheat-based. Papa Johns does not offer a gluten-free version of the Garlic Knots.

No MSG: Papa Johns explicitly states no MSG is used in any standard ingredients, including the garlic parmesan seasoning. This is a genuine differentiator at this price point.

This is the most common question customers ask when choosing Papa Johns sides, and the honest answer depends on what experience you want.

Best forSharing as finger food, dippingPairing alongside pizza for a fuller meal
Calories per piece110 kcal~150–170 kcal
VegetarianYesYes

The verdict: Order Garlic Knots if you want a more intense garlic flavor in a shareable finger-food format at a slightly lower price per item. Order Garlic Parmesan Breadsticks if you want a larger, more substantial bread side that feels closer to a proper garlic bread accompaniment to your Cheese Pizza. For a group of four or more, ordering both creates a more varied side spread.

The Definitive Dipping Sauce Ranking

Not all dipping sauces are created equal for this specific side. Here is an honest ranking based on flavor compatibility, not calorie count:

Tier 1 — Outstanding pairings:

Special Garlic Sauce ($0.85 extra) — The best upgrade available. Papa Johns' proprietary garlic butter sauce has the same garlic profile as the knot coating, which creates a layered garlic experience rather than a competing flavor. High in calories (~150 per cup) but the flavor payoff is undeniable. This is a staple in Austin, TX and Charlotte, NC.

Ranch Dipping Sauce ($0.85 extra) — The cool, herby creaminess of ranch cuts directly through the richness of the garlic parmesan coating. This is the most popular alternative dipping sauce at Papa Johns locations for both Garlic Knots and Breadsticks.

Tier 2 — Solid choices:

Original Pizza Sauce (included free) — The included tomato sauce is a classic pairing that works well because the acidity of the tomato cuts through the fat of the garlic butter. Not exciting but completely functional.

Buffalo Dipping Sauce ($0.85 extra) — An underrated pairing. The vinegary heat of buffalo sauce contrasts well with the mild richness of the Garlic Knots. At only ~45 calories per cup, it is also the best low-calorie upgrade on the menu.

Tier 3 — Works but not ideal:

Honey Mustard ($0.85) — The sweetness of honey mustard competes with rather than complements the garlic parmesan flavor. Works for kids or those who find the garlic too assertive.

Blue Cheese ($0.85) — Too pungent for most people alongside an already strongly flavored knot. Better suited to wings.

Tier 4 — Skip it:

Cheese Dipping Sauce — Adds a processed cheese flavor that does not complement the freshly baked parmesan already on the knots. Multiple food reviewers have described this combination as "redundant and heavy."

Papa Johns vs Domino's vs Pizza Hut

FeaturePapa Johns Garlic KnotsDomino's Parmesan Bread TwistsPizza Hut Breadsticks
FormatKnotted dough ballsTwisted rope stripsFlat rectangular sticks
Dough qualityFresh, never-frozenFresh dailyFresh daily
Qty per order888
Starting price$6.99~$5.99~$6.99
Garlic intensityHighMediumMedium
Cheese on topParmesan (real)Parmesan blendVaries by location
TextureDense, chewy, crispy tipsLight, twisted, softerLong, soft, slightly chewy
Included saucePizza sauceMarinaraMarinara
Calories / piece110~90–100~140–150

What Papa Johns does best: The garlic intensity on the Garlic Knots is noticeably higher than either Domino's or Pizza Hut equivalents. The fresh dough also gives the interior an airy crumb that the twisted format concentrates into a smaller, more satisfying piece.

Where Domino's wins: Price and slightly lighter texture. Domino's Bread Twists are also more consistent across locations like Boston, MA.

Where Pizza Hut falls short: Pizza Hut's breadsticks are longer and more filling per piece, but the garlic flavor is noticeably milder and the texture tends toward soft-and-uniform.

The Problem with Papa Johns Garlic Knots (Honest Assessment)

No honest review is complete without acknowledging the main criticism: The cooling problem.

Papa Johns Garlic Knots are excellent when eaten within five to ten minutes of coming out of the oven. However, as they cool, the dough becomes increasingly dense and chewy. This is a direct consequence of the same fresh dough quality that makes them good when hot: fermented dough stales faster than processed dough.

The solution: Order Garlic Knots for carryout rather than delivery whenever possible. Eating them directly from the box within five minutes of pickup gives you the best version. If you must order via delivery, request that the driver place them in a bag separate from the pizza box heat.

The reheating method: If you have leftovers, the air fryer at 350°F for 3–4 minutes is the correct reheating method. It re-crisps the tips and warms the interior without the microwave's moisture-trapping effect. Never microwave cold Garlic Knots — it is the fastest way to ruin them.

Ordering Hacks That Make Papa Johns Garlic Knots Better

  • Request "well done" — Requesting well-done bake produces crispier tips and a firmer exterior that holds up better in delivery transit and stays palatable longer.
  • Add extra garlic parmesan packets — Ask for two or three extra packets when ordering to amplify the cheese flavor and add texture.
  • Sprinkle crushed red pepper — The mild heat from a pinch of crushed pepper enhances the garlic flavor without overpowering it.
  • Order two extra dipping sauces — One pizza sauce cup is rarely enough. Two buffalo or ranch cups is the correct ratio for a full order.
  • Pair with the right pizza — Garlic Knots are a stronger pairing with tomato-based pizzas (Pepperoni, The Works) than with BBQ-sauce pizzas.

How to Order Papa Johns Garlic Knots

Online: Go to papajohns-menus.us → Sides → Garlic Knots → Add to cart → Select dipping sauces → Apply promo code → Choose carryout.

Papa Johns App: The fastest ordering method with Papa Track delivery tracking. App users sometimes get promotional bundle deals.

By Phone: Call your local Papa Johns — find the number at our Store Locator. When ordering by phone, specifically request "well done".

Carryout vs Delivery: Carryout is strongly recommended for Garlic Knots. Fresh from the oven is categorically better than after 25–40 minutes of delivery transit.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much are Papa Johns Garlic Knots in 2026?

An order of 8 Garlic Knots with pizza sauce dipping cup costs $6.99. Additional dipping sauces are $0.85 each. Under the Papa Pairings deal, Garlic Knots qualify at $6.99 per item when ordering two or more qualifying items together.

How many calories are in Papa Johns Garlic Knots?

Each individual Garlic Knot contains approximately 110 calories. A full order of 8 knots contains approximately 880 calories, not including dipping sauce. The included pizza sauce adds about 30 calories; the Special Garlic Sauce adds approximately 150 calories.

Are Papa Johns Garlic Knots vegetarian?

Yes. The Garlic Knots contain no meat. They are suitable for vegetarians but not vegans, as the garlic parmesan seasoning contains dairy (Parmesan cheese and butter).

What dipping sauce comes with Papa Johns Garlic Knots?

Every order includes one cup of Original Pizza Sauce. Additional sauces — including Special Garlic Sauce, Ranch, Buffalo, Honey Mustard, Blue Cheese, and Marinara — can be added for $0.85 each.

What is the difference between Papa Johns Garlic Knots and Breadsticks?

Garlic Knots are smaller, denser, knotted dough pieces (8 per order, $6.99) with higher garlic flavor intensity per bite. Breadsticks are cut from a larger pizza dough base, airier, and come 10 per order ($7.29 for Original, $7.99 for Garlic Parmesan). Knots have crunchier tips due to their knotted shape; breadsticks have a more uniform texture.

How many Garlic Knots come in an order?

Every Papa Johns Garlic Knots order comes with 8 knots. There is no half-order or large order option — the standard eight-knot order is the only available size.

Can I reheat Papa Johns Garlic Knots?

Yes. The best reheating method is an air fryer at 350°F for 3–4 minutes, which restores the crispiness of the tips without making the interior rubbery. Avoid microwaving — it creates a dense, chewy texture that significantly reduces the quality of the knot.

Are Papa Johns Garlic Knots gluten-free?

No. The dough is wheat-based and contains gluten. Papa Johns does not offer a gluten-free version of Garlic Knots.

Not all pizzas pair equally well with Garlic Knots. Here are the ideal combinations:

title: Papa Johns Order Tracker & Cancel Order — Complete Guide (2026)
excerpt: Learn exactly how to place a Papa Johns order in 2026 — online, via app, phone, or DoorDash. Compare delivery vs carryout and track your pizza.
author: Editorial Team
imageAlt: papa johns order online delivery app guide
content:
Whether it's Friday night pizza with the family or a last minute office lunch, placing a Papa Johns order is one of the fastest and easiest ways to get fresh, hot pizza delivered to your door. But with multiple ways to order — website, app, phone, DoorDash, Uber Eats, and more — it helps to know exactly which method saves you the most money and gets your pizza there fastest.

This complete menu guide covers every Papa Johns ordering method, step-by-step instructions, delivery fees, promo code tricks, and how to use the Papa Track feature so you always know where your pizza is.

How to Place a Papa Johns Order in 2026 — 5 Ways Compared

Papa Johns gives customers five main ways to order. Each has its own pros and cons depending on your situation.

Ordering Method Best For Rewards Eligible Promo Codes
PapaJohns.com (website) Full menu + most deals ✅ Yes ✅ Yes
Papa Johns App (iOS/Android) Fastest reorder + tracking ✅ Yes ✅ App exclusive deals
Phone Seniors, limited internet ❌ No rewards ❌ Limited
DoorDash / Uber Eats / Grubhub Late night, third-party deals ❌ No Papa Rewards ❌ Limited
Carryout In Store Fastest pickup + no delivery fee ✅ Yes ✅ Yes

Bottom line: For best value, order through the Papa Johns website or app — you'll earn Papa Rewards points and have access to all current promo codes.

Method 1: How to Order Papa Johns Online (Website)

Ordering from papajohns.com is the most popular method and gives you the widest selection of deals, coupons, and customization options.

Step by step:

  • Go to papajohns.com or visit our menu with prices.
  • Enter your delivery address or choose "Carryout" to find your nearest store.
  • Browse the menu — Classic Pizzas, Super Loaded, Papadias, Sides, Desserts, Drinks.
  • Customize your order — choose your crust, size, toppings, sauce, and dipping cups.
  • Add to cart and review your items.
  • Apply your promo code — check verified Papa Johns coupons before checkout.
  • Choose your payment — Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, or gift card.
  • Place your order and receive a confirmation with your Papa Track link.

Pro tip: Always log in to your Papa Rewards account before ordering online. Every dollar you spend earns Papa Dough points toward free pizza.

Method 2: How to Order Papa Johns on the App

The Papa Johns app (free on iOS and Android) is the fastest way to reorder your favorites and includes exclusive app-only promo codes not available anywhere else.

What the app offers:

  • One tap reorder from your last 90 days of orders
  • Exclusive app-only deals and push notification alerts for flash sales
  • Papa Track real-time delivery tracking
  • Future Ordering — schedule your pizza up to 7 days in advance
  • Multiple saved addresses and payment methods
  • Google Pay and Apple Pay support for instant checkout

App exclusive benefit: Papa Johns regularly sends push notification deals like "40% off your next order" exclusively to app users. Turn on notifications to never miss a deal.

Method 3: How to Order Papa Johns by Phone

If you prefer to order by phone, call your local Papa Johns store directly. You can find the number for your nearest location using the Papa Johns store locator.

Note: Phone orders don't earn Papa Rewards points and typically don't accept online promo codes. For maximum savings, stick to the website or app.

Method 4: Papa Johns Order via DoorDash, Uber Eats & Grubhub

You can also order Papa Johns through third-party delivery apps. This is convenient when you already have a DoorDash or Uber Eats subscription or when a platform is running its own promotion.

Important things to know before ordering through third-party apps:

  • Prices may be higher — third-party apps sometimes charge menu markups of 10 to 20% above the regular price
  • Papa Rewards points are NOT earned on third-party orders — only direct Papa Johns orders qualify
  • Papa Johns promo codes do not work on DoorDash, Uber Eats, or Grubhub
  • DashPass subscribers can get free delivery on Papa Johns orders above the minimum
  • Delivery time estimates are handled by the third-party app, not Papa Johns

Verdict Use DoorDash or Uber Eats when you have a subscription discount or a platform specific deal. Otherwise, order directly through Papa Johns to earn rewards and use promo codes.

Papa Johns Delivery vs Carryout — Which Is Better?

Delivery:

  • Delivery fee ranges from $3.99 to $5.99 depending on your location
  • Many locations offer free delivery on orders over $40
  • Estimated wait time: 25 to 45 minutes depending on distance and store traffic
  • No contact delivery is available by default on all orders
  • You can track your order door to door with Papa Track

Carryout:

  • No delivery fee — you pick up at the store
  • Usually faster — typically 15 to 20 minutes from order to pickup
  • Papa Johns often runs carryout exclusive deals, especially for large pizzas
  • Full Papa Rewards points earned just like delivery

Bottom line If you live close to a Papa Johns and want to save on fees, carryout is the smarter choice. For convenience, delivery is hard to beat.

How to Cancel a Papa Johns Order Online — Step by Step

Papa Johns mein cancel karna possible hai — lekin timing bahut important hai. Agar aapka order abhi dough prep stage mein nahi pahuncha, toh cancellation usually hoti hai. Neeche teenon tareeqe diye gaye hain.

How to Cancel on the Website

  • PapaJohns.com par jao aur apne account mein login karo.
  • Top right corner mein apna naam click karo, phir "My Orders" select karo.
  • Recent order dhundho jise cancel karna hai.
  • Agar "Cancel Order" button available hai — click karo aur confirm karo.
  • Agar button available nahi — seedha store call karo.

Note: Cancellation button tabhi show hoga jab order abhi dough prep stage par nahi pahuncha. Baad mein yeh option disappear ho jata hai.

How to Cancel on the App

  • Papa Johns app kholo (iOS ya Android).
  • Bottom navigation mein "Orders" tab par tap karo.
  • Active order select karo.
  • "Cancel Order" option dhundho — agar available hai toh tap karo aur confirm karo.
  • Agar option nahi dikh raha — app se store ka number nikaalo aur call karo.

How to Cancel by Phone

Phone se cancel karna sabse reliable method hai, especially agar order web/app mein manually cancel nahi ho raha.

  • Store locator se apne nearest Papa Johns ka number nikaalo.
  • Store par call karo aur apna order number batao (confirmation email mein hoga).
  • Manager se cancel request karo — jitni jaldi call karo utna behtar.
  • Refund 3–5 business days mein aata hai card par.
  • Store par call karna sabse fast method hai.

Can I Cancel After the Order is Being Made?

Short answer: Mushkil hai, lekin try karo. Agar Papa Track show karta hai ke order "Baking" stage mein aa gaya hai toh cancellation typically nahi hoti — store manager ki discretion hoti hai. Agar "Order Received" ya "Dough Prep" stage hai toh jaldi call karo.

Papa Track Stage Cancel Possible? Action
Order Received✅ YES — easilyWebsite/App ya call
Dough Prep✅ Usually YESJaldi call karo store
Baking❌ UnlikelyTry calling — manager decide karega
Quality Check❌ NOOrder ready ho gaya
Out for Delivery❌ NOOrder aa raha hai

Papa Johns Order Tracker — How to Track Your Papa Johns Order

Want to track my Papa Johns order in real time? Papa Johns ka built-in Papa Track system use karo — jo automatically activate hota hai jab aap online ya app se order karte hain. Papa johns order tracking is super easy: simply log in to your account and your active order status shows up immediately. Whether you need to track a Papa John's order placed 10 minutes ago or check if your delivery driver has left — Papa Track covers every stage, from dough prep to your front door.

The 5 stages of Papa Track:

  1. Order Received — your order has been confirmed and sent to the store
  2. Dough Prep — fresh dough is being hand-tossed for your pizza
  3. Baking — your pizza is in the oven
  4. Quality Check — team member inspects your order before it leaves the store
  5. Out for Delivery — your driver is on the way

Papa Track makes Papa Johns one of the most transparent pizza delivery services in the US — you'll never be left wondering where your order is.

Papa Johns Promo Codes & Deals

The best way to save on a Papa Johns order is to use a verified promo code before checkout. Papa Johns regularly offers:

  • 25% off your entire online order
  • BOGO (Buy One Get One) pizza deals
  • $10 off orders over $30
  • Large pizza for $9.99 carryout specials
  • 50% off when ordering through the app

Pro tip: Stack your promo code with a Papa Rewards redemption for maximum savings. For example, apply a 25% off code AND redeem Papa Dough points on the same order to minimize your total.

Papa Rewards — Earn Points on Every Papa Johns Order

Every $1 you spend earns Papa Dough points. Redeem Papa Dough toward any menu item — pizza, sides, desserts, drinks. Birthday reward: free dessert every year just for being a member! Create a free account at papajohns.com or in the app — it takes under 2 minutes and costs nothing.

What to Order — Papa Johns Best Items in 2026

  • Best Classic Pizzas: Pepperoni, The Works, The Meats
  • Best Specialty Pizzas: BBQ Chicken Bacon, Fiery Buffalo Chicken, Shaq a Roni
  • Best Sides: Garlic Knots, Breadsticks, Wings
  • Best Desserts: Chocolate Chip Cookie, Cinnamon Pull Aparts, Oreo Papa Bites

Papa Johns Crust Options — Choose Before You Order

Crust Description Extra Cost
Original CrustClassic hand-tossed, medium thicknessIncluded
Thin CrustLight, crispy, less doughIncluded
New York StyleLarge foldable slices, airy crustIncluded
Epic Stuffed CrustMozzarella baked into the edge+$3.00
Garlic Stuffed CrustGarlic herb butter + cheese in crust+$3.50

Papa Johns Payment Methods — What You Can Use

  • Credit/Debit Cards: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover
  • Digital Wallets: Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal
  • Gift Cards: Papa Johns gift cards (physical and digital)
  • Cash: Accepted for carryout orders at the store only

Common Papa Johns Order Problems — Quick Fixes

  • My promo code isn't working: Check that the code hasn't expired. Make sure your cart meets the minimum order requirement.
  • I can't track my order: Make sure you're logged in to the same account used when ordering. Check your email confirmation for the direct Papa Track link.
  • I forgot to apply my promo code before checkout: Unfortunately, promo codes generally cannot be applied after an order is placed.
  • My order is very late: Use Papa Track to check the current status. If the order shows "Out for Delivery" for more than 30 minutes, contact the store.

faqs.question: Can I schedule a Papa Johns order in advance?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Future Ordering feature on the Papa Johns app lets you schedule delivery or carryout up to 7 days ahead. This is perfect for parties, game days, or office lunches.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns deliver to hotels?
faqs.answer: Yes. Enter the hotel address and room number in the delivery notes at checkout. Most Papa Johns locations will deliver to hotel lobbies or rooms.

faqs.question: Can I order Papa Johns gluten free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Papa Johns offers an Ancient Grains Gluten Free Crust (+$2.00). Note that it's prepared in a shared kitchen, so it is not certified Celiac safe   it's best for those with general gluten sensitivity.

faqs.question: How do I cancel a Papa Johns order?
faqs.answer: Contact your local Papa Johns store directly as soon as possible. Orders can typically be cancelled before the dough preparation stage. After that, cancellations are at the store manager's discretion.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns have vegetarian or vegan options?
faqs.answer: Yes. Vegetarian options include Garden Fresh Pizza, Tuscan Six Cheese, and Fresh Spinach & Tomato Alfredo. For vegan orders, request any pizza without cheese   the original dough and tomato sauce are vegan friendly.

faqs.question: Why can't I track my Papa Johns order?
faqs.answer: Agar aap apna Papa Johns order track nahi kar pa rahe, toh yeh 3 main reasons ho sakte hain: (1) Aap us account mein logged in nahi hain jis se order place kiya tha. (2) Order guest checkout se place kiya — confirmation email mein direct Papa Track link hoga. (3) Third-party app (DoorDash/Uber Eats) se order kiya — wahan Papa Track available nahi hota. Fix: Confirmation email dhundho aur usme Papa Track link par click karo.

faqs.question: How do I cancel an order on the Papa Johns app?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns app par order cancel karna ka process: (1) App kholo aur 'Orders' tab tap karo. (2) Active order select karo. (3) 'Cancel Order' button tap karo — agar available hai. (4) Agar button nahi dikh raha toh order already baking stage mein aa gaya — directly store call karo.

faqs.question: How long does a Papa Johns order take?
faqs.answer: Delivery typically takes 25 to 45 minutes depending on distance and traffic. Carryout is faster, usually ready in 15 to 20 minutes. During peak hours (Fri/Sat evenings), delivery can take up to 60 minutes. Use the 'Future Ordering' feature in the app to schedule your order in advance.

title: Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza: Price, Calories, All Varieties & Honest Review (2026)
imageAlt: Papa Johns epic stuffed crust pizza review and price
excerpt: Everything about Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza in 2026 — Epic vs Garlic vs Cheesy Calzone, exact prices, calories per slice, honest review & best ordering tips.
author: Papa Johns Menu Experts
content:
If you've ever wanted your pizza crust to pull its own weight, Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza is the answer. Instead of finishing with a dry, bread-only rim, every bite of crust snaps open to reveal a ribbon of hot, melted mozzarella — and depending on which variety you choose, a hit of garlic butter, ricotta, or spicy chili oil along with it.

Papa Johns launched its stuffed crust program in December 2020 — years after Pizza Hut invented the category — but it made up for lost time fast. Today, the Epic Stuffed Crust lineup is widely considered one of the best stuffed crusts among the major pizza chains, with three distinct varieties, two price points, and enough topping combinations to keep any pizza lover busy.

This complete 2026 guide covers every Papa Johns stuffed crust option — ingredients, exact prices, calories per slice, how it compares to Pizza Hut and Domino's, and a straight honest review of what's worth ordering and what isn't.

What Is Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza?

Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza — officially called the "Epic Stuffed Crust" — is any Papa Johns pizza where the outer dough rim has been hand-stuffed with a cheese filling before baking. The result is a golden, puffed crust edge that contains a melty pocket of mozzarella (or garlic-herb ricotta, depending on the variety) baked directly into the dough.

Unlike a thin or original crust pizza where the edge is mostly bread, a stuffed crust pizza from Papa Johns gives you two eating experiences in one: the pizza itself, and what is essentially a warm cheesy breadstick built right into the rim.

Available only on large pizzas. The Epic Stuffed Crust is currently available exclusively on large (14-inch) pies. It is not available on small, medium, or extra-large sizes.

All Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Varieties (2026)

Papa Johns currently offers three stuffed crust options. Each uses the same base — fresh, never-frozen original dough hand-stuffed to order — but differs in what goes inside the crust and on top of it.

1. Epic Stuffed Crust (Classic)

The original. Papa Johns Epic Stuffed Crust is a large pizza on standard hand-tossed dough with real mozzarella cheese stuffed and sealed inside the entire crust rim. The outside of the crust bakes to a light golden finish with a lightly floury, soft surface.

What makes it different from regular crust:
The entire outer rim — what you'd normally leave on the plate or dip into sauce — is filled with a continuous rope of mozzarella. When you bite into it, the cheese stretches and pulls, making the crust as satisfying as the pizza itself.

Available with: Any pizza topping combination, any sauce on the menu. You can get Epic Stuffed Crust with a cheese pizza, pepperoni, The Works, BBQ Chicken Bacon — any build you want.

Extra cost: +$3.00 over the base pizza price.

2. Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust

The fan favorite. Papa Johns took the classic Epic Stuffed Crust and added its most beloved ingredient — the signature Special Garlic Sauce — in three places at once: inside the crust, on top of the crust, and in a separate dipping cup.

The crust itself is stuffed with garlic-seasoned mozzarella, then coated on the outside with a garlic parmesan sauce and dusted with garlic-parmesan seasoning before baking. The result is a toasted, lightly crunchy exterior with a deep umami-forward garlic note and a creamy, cheesy interior.

Food reviewers consistently rank this as the best of Papa Johns' stuffed crust options. One major food publication noted that the garlic seasoning creates a "crunchy umami bite" that the plain Epic Stuffed Crust simply cannot match.

Extra cost: +$3.50 over the base pizza price.

Best paired with: Original sauce pizzas, Pepperoni, or The Works — the garlic crust complements classic toppings better than BBQ or Buffalo sauce builds, where flavor clash can be an issue.

3. Cheesy Calzone Epic Stuffed Crust

The most indulgent option. Papa Johns' Cheesy Calzone Epic Stuffed Crust takes the stuffed crust concept furthest by filling the dough rim with a blend of mozzarella and garlic-herb ricotta — essentially turning the crust into a calzone filling baked into a pizza edge.

The ricotta adds a creamier, richer texture compared to the pure-mozzarella options, and the garlic-herb seasoning gives it an Italian flavor profile distinct from the other two varieties.

Extra cost: Available as a specialty build; prices vary by location (typically +$3.50 to $4.00 over base pizza).

Best paired with: Classic pepperoni or the Tuscan Six Cheese pizza — the creamy ricotta filling pairs best with simpler, less competing flavors on top.

Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza Prices (2026)

Prices below are for a large (14-inch) pizza as a base, with the stuffed crust upgrade applied. Prices may vary slightly by location.

Stuffed Crust Variety Crust Upgrade Cost Example: Large Pepperoni Total
Epic Stuffed Crust (Classic) +$3.00 ~$18.99
Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust +$3.50 ~$19.49
Cheesy Calzone Epic Stuffed Crust +$3.50 to $4.00 ~$18.99 to $19.99

Important: One-topping stuffed crust promotional deals (e.g., $13.99 to $14.99 for a 1-topping large) appear regularly on the Papa Johns coupons page. If you're ordering a stuffed crust pizza, checking for a deal before checkout almost always saves you $4 to $7.

Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza Calories & Nutrition (Per Slice, Large)

A large Papa Johns pizza is cut into 8 slices. Calorie counts below are per slice of a large pizza and will vary based on toppings.

Variety Calories/Slice Fat Carbs Protein Sodium
Epic Stuffed Crust Cheese 360 cal 14g 40g 15g ~900mg
Epic Stuffed Crust Pepperoni 390 cal 16g 41g 17g ~1,000mg
Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust (no topping) 370 cal 16g 39g 16g ~990mg
Cheesy Calzone Epic Stuffed Crust 350 cal 14g 41g 14g ~910mg

Why stuffed crust is higher in calories than regular crust:
The cheese filling adds approximately 60 to 90 extra calories per slice compared to Papa Johns Original Crust, plus additional fat and sodium from the mozzarella and any garlic butter applied to the exterior. For full nutritional details on all menu items, visit the Papa Johns Nutrition Guide.

Stuffed Crust Pizza vs Regular Crust — Is It Worth the Upgrade?

Feature Epic Stuffed Crust Original Crust Thin Crust
Extra cost +$3.00 to $3.50 Included Included
Calories per slice (cheese) ~360 ~270 ~210
Crust texture Soft, puffy, cheesy rim Medium thickness, hand-tossed Light, crispy
Best for Cheese lovers, casual dinner, sharing Everyday orders, any preference Lower-calorie choice
Available sizes Large only Small to XL Small to XL

Verdict If you're sharing a pizza for a casual dinner or a game night, the stuffed crust upgrade at $3.00 to $3.50 is strong value — it essentially adds a round of cheesy breadsticks built into your pizza. If you're watching calories or ordering for one, the original crust gives you more flexibility in size and is meaningfully lighter.

Papa Johns Stuffed Crust vs Pizza Hut vs Domino's

Feature Papa Johns Epic Stuffed Crust Pizza Hut Stuffed Crust Domino's Parmesan Stuffed Crust
Price (1-topping large) ~$14.99 to $19.99 ~$15.99 to $21.99 ~$20.24 (medium only)
Cheese inside crust Mozzarella (or ricotta on Calzone) Mozzarella string cheese Mozzarella with parmesan exterior
Size available Large only Large only Medium only
Dough quality Fresh, never-frozen Standard chain dough Standard chain dough
Crust texture Soft, pillowy, lightly floury Softer, slightly sweeter Firm, cheesy, parmesan-crunchy
Garlic option Yes (Garlic Epic) No (plain only) Yes (parmesan seasoned)
Dipping sauce included Yes — Special Garlic Sauce No (paid add on) No (paid add on)

The honest take: Papa Johns uses fresh, never-frozen dough across its entire menu, which is a genuine advantage over the competition. The dough quality and the inclusion of a free garlic dipping sauce with every pizza are two areas where Papa Johns has a clear edge.

Pizza Hut's stuffed crust has the nostalgia factor and a slightly more pronounced cheese pull. Domino's Parmesan Stuffed Crust has strong flavor from the parmesan exterior. Papa Johns' Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust is arguably the most well-rounded of the three — it adds real flavor complexity, not just melted cheese.

Honest Review: Papa Johns Epic Stuffed Crust Pizza

Here is a candid breakdown of each stuffed crust variety — what's genuinely good and where it falls short.

Epic Stuffed Crust (Classic) — 7/10
Solid execution but not exciting on its own. The mozzarella filling is hot, stretchy, and melts well. The outer crust bakes to a soft, lightly floury finish that tastes clean and pairs well with the garlic dipping sauce. The issue is that without the garlic treatment, the crust is pleasant but not particularly memorable. If garlic is an option, the plain version is hard to justify alongside it. Best ordered when you want the cheese pull experience without an overwhelming flavor addition.

Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust — 9/10
The best of the three by a clear margin. The garlic-parmesan coating on the outside gives the crust a lightly crunchy, umami-rich exterior that makes it genuinely enjoyable to eat on its own — no dipping sauce required, though the included garlic sauce makes it even better. Papa Johns fans who use the Special Garlic Sauce with every pizza will find this a natural evolution. The one genuine flaw: the garlic flavor could go harder. The parmesan notes dominate slightly over the garlic. Still, it's the single best stuffed crust option among the major pizza chains.

Cheesy Calzone Epic Stuffed Crust — 8/10
The ricotta-mozzarella blend inside the crust creates a richer, creamier experience that feels more indulgent than the plain mozzarella version. The garlic-herb seasoning in the ricotta comes through clearly and adds an Italian character distinct from the other two options. It works best when paired with simple toppings — the creaminess of the crust filling competes with bold sauces like BBQ or Buffalo. For cheese lovers who want something different, this is worth trying.

How to Order Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza

Ordering a stuffed crust pizza from Papa Johns takes three additional steps compared to a standard order.

Step 1 — Choose your base pizza
Start with any pizza on the menu — Classic Cheese, Pepperoni, The Works, BBQ Chicken Bacon, or any specialty pizza. Stuffed crust is available on all pizza builds.

Step 2 — Select your crust at the crust selection screen
During the customization step, you'll see crust options. Choose Epic Stuffed Crust (+$3.00), Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust (+$3.50), or Cheesy Calzone Epic Stuffed Crust (+$3.50 to $4.00). Note: stuffed crust is only available for large size — if you have a different size selected, switch to large first.

Step 3 — Check for a promo code before checkout
Papa Johns regularly runs deals like "Large 1-topping Stuffed Crust for $13.99" or "25% off your entire order." Always check the verified Papa Johns coupons page before hitting Place Order. A promo code on a stuffed crust order typically saves $4 to $7.

Ordering channels: Stuffed crust is available for both delivery and carryout through the Papa Johns website, the Papa Johns app, or by phone. The website and app offer the best deals and earn you Papa Rewards points. See the complete Papa Johns ordering guide for full step-by-step instructions.

Best Toppings to Pair with Papa Johns Stuffed Crust

Not all toppings work equally well with stuffed crust. Because the crust itself already adds richness and saltiness, lighter or more classic toppings tend to work best.

Best pairings for Epic Stuffed Crust (Classic):
Classic Pepperoni, The Works, Sausage & Mushroom, or any build with original tomato sauce. The neutral mozzarella crust lets the toppings take center stage.

Best pairings for Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust:
Pepperoni, The Meats, or Tuscan Six Cheese with original sauce. The garlic-forward crust competes with BBQ and Buffalo sauce bases — avoid mixing strong sauce flavors with the garlic crust.

Best pairings for Cheesy Calzone Epic Stuffed Crust:
Simple builds work best. Classic Cheese, Pepperoni, or vegetarian options with original or Alfredo sauce. The ricotta filling is rich enough that overloading toppings makes the pizza feel heavy.

Always request: Papa Johns includes a free cup of Special Garlic Sauce with every pizza. Ask for an extra cup when ordering a stuffed crust pizza — it is the perfect dipping sauce for the crust rim.

Calorie Comparison — Stuffed Crust vs Other Crust Types

Original Crust ~270 cal baseline
Cheesy Calzone ESC ~350 cal +80 cal
Epic Stuffed Crust ~360 cal +90 cal
Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust ~370 cal +100 cal

The cheese filling adds approximately 60–90 extra calories per slice compared to Original Crust.

Who Should Order Papa Johns Stuffed Crust?

✅ Perfect For:

  • Cheese lovers who eat every bit of crust
  • Families sharing a pizza for dinner or celebrations
  • Game nights, parties, group orders
  • Anyone upgrading from regular crust for the first time
  • People who use the Special Garlic Sauce dip with every order

❌ Not Ideal For:

  • People on strict calorie budgets (+90 cal/slice vs original)
  • Those with dairy or gluten allergies
  • Thin crust or crispy-style pizza fans
  • Anyone who prefers bold, heavy sauce bases (garlic variety may clash)

Papa Johns Stuffed Crust Pizza — Quick Facts

  • Launched in the USA: December 2020
  • Available size: Large (14-inch) only

  • Calories per slice (large, cheese): 350 to 390 depending on variety
  • Dipping sauce included: Yes — Special Garlic Sauce
  • Available for: Delivery and carryout
  • Gluten-free option: Not available on stuffed crust

Storage & Reheating — Keep the Crust Crispy

How to Store Leftovers:

  • Cool to room temperature within 2 hours
  • Store in an airtight container or wrap slices individually in foil
  • Refrigerate for up to 3 days
  • Freeze for up to 1 month (wrap each slice separately before freezing)

❌ Microwave High 60–90 sec Worst — cheese turns rubbery, crust softens

Pro Tip: If you must use the microwave, place a cup of water inside alongside the pizza — it slightly reduces cheese rubberiness.

faqs.question: What is on the Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza?
faqs.answer: The Spicy Italian Pizza is loaded with a three meat combination of spicy Italian sausage, salami, and pepperoni, served over Papa Johns original tomato sauce and 100% real mozzarella cheese.

faqs.answer: It has a moderate kick. The heat primarily comes from the spicy Italian sausage and the pepperoni. On a scale of 1 10, most customers rate it at a 4 5 for spice level.

faqs.answer: The Original Hand Tossed crust is the best choice as it provides a sturdy base for the heavy meat toppings. However, the Epic Stuffed Crust is a popular upgrade for those who want a cheesier finish.

faqs.question: How much does the Spicy Italian Pizza cost at Papa Johns?
faqs.answer: Prices start at $13.99 for a small and go up to $20.99 for an extra large. A large typically costs $18.99. You can often find it for $14.99 during specialty pizza promotions.

content:
If you are looking for the most meat intensive and flavorful specialty pizza at Papa Johns locations, the Spicy Italian Pizza is the heavy hitter on the menu. Unlike the standard Pepperoni Pizza which relies on a single meat topping, the Spicy Italian brings a massive three meat punch that delivers more texture, more salt, and significantly more spice than the chain’s other Italian style builds.

In 2026, it remains a top five seller for customers who want something bolder than The Works but less complex than the BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza. It is a refined, protein packed pizza that focuses on high quality Italian meats and the signature Papa Johns mozzarella blend.

This 2026 guide covers everything you need to know: exact pricing, full calorie breakdown per slice, the complete ingredient list, spice level assessment, the best crust pairings, and a straight honest review of whether it lives up to the “Spicy” name.

What Is Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza?

The Spicy Italian Pizza is a meat specialty pizza that combines three distinct proteins to create its flavor profile. It starts with the signature never frozen fresh dough, followed by a layer of original vine ripened tomato sauce and 100% real mozzarella cheese. The “Spicy” element comes from the specific selection of toppings:

  • Spicy Italian Sausage: A bold, herb forward sausage with a noticeable kick of red pepper flakes.
  • Salami: Thinly sliced, salty, and cured Italian meat that adds a delicate chewy texture.
  • Pepperoni: Thick cut and spicy, providing the base oils and heat that tie the meats together.

While many chains offer a “Meat Lover's” style pizza, Papa Johns Spicy Italian differs because it focuses specifically on the Italian flavor profile rather than just piling on every meat available. You won’t find ham, bacon, or beef here this is a curated selection designed to taste like a premium Italian sub in pizza form.

Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza Full Toppings & Ingredients

  1. Original Sauce: Vine ripened tomato sauce with herbs.
  2. 100% Real Mozzarella: Fresh, never frozen cheese blend.
  3. Spicy Italian Sausage: Premium pork sausage seasoned with garlic and chili.
  4. Salami: Traditional cured beef and pork salami.
  5. Pepperoni: Papa Johns signature spicy pepperoni.
  6. Three Cheese Blend: A dusting of Parmesan, Romano, and Asiago for a sharp finish.

Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza Prices by Size (2026)

SizePrice (2026)Slice Qty
Small (10")$13.996 slices
Medium (12")$15.998 slices
Large (14")$18.998 slices
Extra Large (16")$20.9910 slices

Note: Prices can vary by about $1.00 depending on whether you are in a high cost city like New York, NY or a more standard market. Always check the Papa Johns coupons page before ordering the Spicy Italian is frequently available under the “Any Large Specialty for $14.99” promotion, which saves you $4.00 instantly.

Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza Calories & Full Nutrition (Per Slice, 2026)

Because the Spicy Italian Pizza contains three fatty meats (sausage, salami, pepperoni), it is more calorie dense than a standard cheese or veggie pizza. Here is the breakdown for the Original Crust build:

SizeCalories (Per Slice)Total Calories (Original Crust)
Small240 kcal1,440 kcal
Medium260 kcal2,080 kcal
Large380 kcal3,040 kcal
Extra Large400 kcal4,000 kcal

How to reduce calories: Switching to Thin Crust on a Large Spicy Italian reduces the calorie count by approximately 70 90 calories per slice, bringing it down to roughly 290 310 kcal. This is highly recommended if you want the meat flavor without the heavy dough impact. For more details, see our Papa Johns Nutrition Guide.

Honest Review: Is It Actually Spicy? (Score: 8.5/10)

The term “Spicy” is subjective in the world of fast food pizza. If you are expecting a “triple x” heat level that requires a glass of milk, you will be disappointed. However, compared to any other pizza at Papa Johns, this is undeniably the heat leader.

The Pros: The combination of the spicy sausage and the thin, salty salami is perfect. The sausage has real texture it is not just mushy meat crumbles. Each bite delivers a consistent zing that builds as you eat. The three meat blend also provides a variety of “chews” that make the pizza more interesting than a standard pepperoni.

The Cons: It is a salty pizza. Between the sauce, the cheese, and three cured meats, you will be thirsty. It also tends to be slightly greasier than other pizzas because of the oil release from both the pepperoni and the salami during baking.

The Verdict: It is the best specialty pizza on the menu for meat lovers. It feels more expensive and premium than it is. If you enjoy a pepperoni pizza but want “more” of everything, this is the correct order.

Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza vs Competitors

Meat Varieties3 (Sausage, Salami, Pepperoni)4+ (Beef, Ham, Sausage, Pep)5+ (Full meat spectrum)
Dough QualityFresh (Never frozen)Fresh DailyStandard Chain
Spice LevelModerate HeatMildMild
Garlic SauceIncluded FreePaid Add onPaid Add on

The Best Crust for Spicy Italian Pizza

  • Original Hand Tossed (Recommended): Provides a sturdy, chewy base that can support the weight of the three meat toppings without sagging.
  • Thin Crust: Excellent for highlighting the meat flavor. It makes the pizza taste more like an Italian appetizer and reduces calories significantly.
  • Epic Stuffed Crust: For the ultimate indulgence. The mozzarella filled rim pairs perfectly with the spicy meats, though it makes the meal very heavy.

FAQ Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza

What is on the Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza?

The Spicy Italian Pizza is loaded with a three meat combination of spicy Italian sausage, salami, and pepperoni, served over Papa Johns original tomato sauce and 100% real mozzarella cheese.

Is Papa Johns Spicy Italian Pizza very spicy?

It has a moderate kick. The heat primarily comes from the spicy Italian sausage and the pepperoni. On a scale of 1 10, most customers rate it at a 4 5 for spice level.

How many calories are in a slice of Spicy Italian Pizza?

A slice of a large Spicy Italian Pizza on original crust contains approximately 380 calories. A small slice is around 240 calories, while a medium slice is 260 calories.

What is the best crust for the Spicy Italian Pizza?

The Original Hand Tossed crust is the best choice as it provides a sturdy base for the heavy meat toppings. However, the Epic Stuffed Crust is a popular upgrade for those who want a cheesier finish.

How much does the Spicy Italian Pizza cost at Papa Johns?

Prices start at $13.99 for a small and go up to $20.99 for an extra large. A large typically costs $18.99. You can often find it for $14.99 during specialty pizza promotions.

Best Pizza Pairings for Spicy Italian

If you are ordering for a group, these pizzas complement the Spicy Italian best:

  • Garden Fresh Pizza: The fresh vegetables provide a light, crisp contrast to the heavy meats of the Spicy Italian.
  • Cheese Pizza: For the kids or those who find the Spicy Italian too bold.
  • Philly Cheesesteak Papadia: Pairs well if you want to keep the "Italian Deli" theme going.

Article Summary (For Quick View)

  • Toppings: Spicy Sausage, Salami, Pepperoni.
  • Best Price: $14.99 (with coupon).

  • Spice Level: 5/10 (Moderate).

title: Papa Johns Mountain Dew — Price, Calories, Sizes & Pizza Pairings 2026
excerpt: If you order Papa Johns regularly, you already know Mountain Dew is not just a drink option — it is the most popular soda pairing with spicy and bold pizzas on the entire menu. This complete 2026 guide covers everything you need to know about Papa Johns Mountain Dew.
author: Papa Johns Drinks Experts
imageAlt: Papa Johns Mountain Dew 20 oz and 2-Liter bottle with price 2026

faqs.question: How much is Mountain Dew at Papa Johns?
faqs.answer: Mountain Dew at Papa Johns costs **$2.99 for a 20 oz bottle** and **$3.49 for a 2-Liter bottle** in 2026. Prices may vary by up to $0.50 depending on your region. Third-party delivery apps charge slightly more than ordering directly through papajohns.com or the Papa Johns app.

faqs.question: How many calories in Papa Johns Mountain Dew?
faqs.answer: A 20 oz bottle of Mountain Dew at Papa Johns contains **290 calories**. Per 12 oz serving, Mountain Dew has 170 calories, 46g of sugar, and 55mg of caffeine. This makes it the most calorie-dense of the three most popular Papa Johns sodas (Mountain Dew, Pepsi, Starry).

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns Mountain Dew have caffeine?
faqs.answer: Yes. Mountain Dew at Papa Johns contains approximately **55mg of caffeine per 12 oz**, or roughly **91mg in a 20 oz bottle**. This is higher than regular Pepsi (38mg/12oz) and makes Mountain Dew the highest-caffeine standard soda on the Papa Johns menu. Mountain Dew Zero Sugar contains even more caffeine at 68mg per 12 oz.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns have Mountain Dew Zero Sugar?
faqs.answer: Yes. Mountain Dew Zero Sugar is available at Papa Johns for the same price as regular Mountain Dew ($2.99 for 20 oz). It has 0 calories, 0g sugar, and uses sucralose and acesulfame potassium as sweeteners instead of high-fructose corn syrup. Note that Mountain Dew Zero Sugar actually contains slightly more caffeine (68mg/12oz) than regular Mountain Dew (55mg/12oz).

faqs.question: What size Mountain Dew does Papa Johns have?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns carries Mountain Dew in two sizes: **20 oz bottle ($2.99)** and **2-Liter bottle ($3.49)**. The 2-Liter provides approximately 5–6 servings of 12 oz and is the best value for orders feeding 3 or more people.

faqs.question: What pizza goes best with Mountain Dew at Papa Johns?
faqs.answer: Mountain Dew pairs best with spicy and bold-flavored pizzas. The **Fiery Buffalo Chicken Pizza**, **Pepperoni Pizza**, and any spicy wing order are the top pairings — the citrus in Mountain Dew provides genuine contrast to capsaicin heat, resetting your palate between bites. For milder or veggie-based pizzas, Pepsi or Aquafina are better choices.

faqs.question: Is Mountain Dew the most popular drink at Papa Johns?
faqs.answer: Pepsi is the highest-volume drink at Papa Johns nationally. However, Mountain Dew has a dedicated, loyal fan base — particularly among customers who regularly order spicy or meat-heavy pizzas. The 2025 Papa Johns x Mountain Dew 'Cini Dirty Soda collaboration also demonstrated the cultural strength of Mountain Dew specifically within the Papa Johns brand.

faqs.question: Can I order just Mountain Dew from Papa Johns without food?
faqs.answer: Yes. Papa Johns allows standalone drink orders via their website, app, and delivery partners like DoorDash and Uber Eats. You can order one or more bottles of Mountain Dew without adding any food items to your cart, though delivery fees still apply.

faqs.question: Is Mountain Dew gluten-free and vegan at Papa Johns?
faqs.answer: Yes on both counts. Mountain Dew contains no gluten-containing ingredients and no animal-derived ingredients. It is suitable for customers with celiac disease, gluten sensitivity, or vegan diets.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns still have Mountain Dew in 2026?
faqs.answer: Yes. Mountain Dew is a permanent item on the Papa Johns drinks menu in 2026 and is available at all US locations. Papa Johns is an official PepsiCo partner, which means Mountain Dew (a PepsiCo brand) is part of the standard national menu alongside Pepsi, Diet Pepsi, Starry, and Aquafina.

content:
If you order Papa Johns regularly, you already know Mountain Dew is not just a drink option is the most popular soda pairing with spicy and bold pizzas on the entire menu. In 2025, Papa Johns and Mountain Dew launched a limited-edition Cini Dirty Soda collaboration, confirming just how strong the relationship between this pizza chain and this soda brand really is.

This complete 2026 guide covers everything you need to know about Papa Johns Mountain Dew: exact prices for every size, full calorie and nutrition breakdown, caffeine content, the Mountain Dew Zero Sugar option, how to order it, and a detailed food pairing guide so you know exactly which pizza goes best with a cold Mountain Dew. For more drink options, visit our Papa Johns Drinks Menu.

Guide Contents

  • Mountain Dew Price 2026
  • Calories & Nutrition Facts
  • Caffeine Content
  • Mountain Dew Zero Sugar
  • Best Pizza Pairings
  • How to Order
  • Frequently Asked Questions

Papa Johns Mountain Dew Price 2026 Every Size

Papa Johns Mountain Dew is available in two bottle sizes at all US locations. Prices are standardized nationally but may vary by up to $0.25 to $0.50 depending on your region. Third-party delivery apps like DoorDash, Grubhub, and Uber Eats typically add a $0.50 to $1.00 markup per item ordering directly through papajohns.com or the Papa Johns app gives you the base price below.

SizePrice (2026)CaloriesBest For
20 oz Bottle$2.99290 calSolo order, individual meal
2-Liter Bottle$3.49170 cal per 12 oz servingFamily meal, group of 4 to 6

Value tip: The 2-Liter at $3.49 gives you approximately 5 to 6 servings of 12 oz each compared to paying $2.99 for a single 20 oz bottle. For any order feeding 3 or more people, the 2-Liter is always the better deal. Under the Papa Pairings deal, you can also bundle a Mountain Dew 2-Liter with a qualifying menu item for $6.99 each.

Is Mountain Dew available in a 2-Liter at Papa Johns? Yes. Mountain Dew is one of the select drinks offered in both 20 oz and 2-Liter sizes. Not every drink on the Papa Johns menu comes in a 2-Liter Mountain Dew, Pepsi, Diet Pepsi, and Pepsi Zero Sugar are the main options that do.

Mountain Dew at Papa Johns Calories & Full Nutrition Facts

Mountain Dew is the most calorie-dense standard soda on the Papa Johns drinks menu. If you are tracking calories, here is everything you need to know before ordering.

Key things to note: Mountain Dew has 170 calories per 12 oz that is 20 more calories per serving than regular Pepsi (150 cal) and the highest calorie count among the standard sodas on the Papa Johns menu. The 46g of sugar per 12 oz is also higher than Pepsi (41g) and Starry (38g).

How Mountain Dew Compares to Other Papa Johns Drinks

Mountain Dew sits in the middle of the calorie range not the highest (Schweppes at 200), but the highest among the three most popular sodas (Mountain Dew, Pepsi, Starry). If you want the same citrus flavor with zero calories, Mountain Dew Zero Sugar is available at Papa Johns and tastes nearly identical.

How Much Caffeine Is in Papa Johns Mountain Dew?

Mountain Dew contains approximately 55mg of caffeine per 12 oz serving making it the highest-caffeine regular soda on the Papa Johns menu. This is notably more than regular Pepsi (38mg) and more than Diet Pepsi (36mg).

For reference, a standard 8 oz cup of brewed coffee contains approximately 95mg of caffeine. A 20 oz Mountain Dew from Papa Johns (91mg) is therefore roughly equivalent to one cup of coffee in caffeine content.

Late-night ordering tip: If you are ordering Papa Johns in the evening and want to sleep within a few hours, consider Starry or Aquafina instead both contain zero caffeine. Mountain Dew's 55mg per 12 oz can delay sleep onset if consumed after 7 to 8 PM, particularly for caffeine-sensitive individuals.

Is Mountain Dew safe for kids? The American Academy of Pediatrics recommends children under 12 avoid caffeinated beverages. For younger children, Aquafina Water or Starry Zero (caffeine-free, 10 calories) are the better choices at Papa Johns.

Mountain Dew Zero Sugar at Papa Johns

Papa Johns also carries Mountain Dew Zero Sugar the zero-calorie version of Mountain Dew that delivers virtually the same citrus flavor with none of the sugar or calories.

One important fact that most people do not know: Mountain Dew Zero Sugar actually contains more caffeine (68mg per 12oz) than regular Mountain Dew (55mg per 12oz). If you are choosing Zero Sugar to reduce caffeine not just calories be aware of this difference.

Mountain Dew Zero Sugar is a good choice for customers on keto or low-carb diets, managing diabetes, or simply trying to reduce sugar intake. The flavor is close enough to the original that most people do not notice a significant difference, especially when paired with bold-flavored pizza.

Best Papa Johns Pizza to Pair with Mountain Dew

Mountain Dew is the most strategic drink pairing for spicy and bold pizzas on the Papa Johns menu. The reason is science, not preference: the citrus acids in Mountain Dew interact with capsaicin (the compound that makes food hot), providing genuine relief from heat between bites. Cola sodas like Pepsi add sweetness Mountain Dew adds citrus contrast, which is more effective for spicy food.

Top Pairings Mountain Dew with Papa Johns Pizzas

Fiery Buffalo Chicken PizzaCitrus in Mountain Dew cuts through capsaicin heat. The single best pairing on the entire menu.★★★★★
Pepperoni PizzaBold citrus offsets the salty, spiced pepperoni. Balances grease without competing with flavor. See Pepperoni Pizza Prices for more.★★★★★
Buffalo Wings / Spicy Garlic WingsCapsaicin-citrus logic applies to wings. Classic accompaniment for exactly this reason. Pair them with our Best Sides.★★★★★
The Meats PizzaHeavy all-meat pizza needs a bold drink. Cuts through the richness better than cola. Similar to The Works Pizza.★★★★☆

Papadias (any flavor)Rich and dense. Citrus punch and carbonation refresh the palate after each bite.★★★★☆

Chocolate Chip Cookie / BrownieNot a natural pairing. Citrus clashes with chocolate. Pepsi or milk work better.★★☆☆☆

Bottom line on pairing: Order Mountain Dew when you are getting anything spicy, peppery, or meat-heavy. Switch to Pepsi for milder pizzas, or Aquafina if you want your drink to be invisible and let the food take center stage.

Mountain Dew Ingredients What Is in It?

Mountain Dew served at Papa Johns is the standard PepsiCo Mountain Dew formula. The full ingredient list is:

Carbonated Water, High Fructose Corn Syrup, Concentrated Orange Juice, Citric Acid, Natural Flavor, Sodium Benzoate (Preserves Freshness), Caffeine, Sodium Citrate, Erythorbic Acid (Preserves Freshness), Gum Arabic, Calcium Disodium EDTA (To Protect Flavor), Brominated Vegetable Oil, Yellow 5.

Key notes on the ingredients:

  • High Fructose Corn Syrup is the primary sweetener not regular cane sugar. This is worth noting for customers watching their sugar intake.
  • Brominated Vegetable Oil (BVO) was a long-running ingredient. As of 2023, PepsiCo removed BVO from Mountain Dew sold in the US following an FDA ruling. Current bottles no longer contain BVO.
  • Yellow 5 (Tartrazine) is the dye that gives Mountain Dew its signature color. Customers with aspirin sensitivity may also react to Yellow 5.
  • Concentrated Orange Juice this is the source of the citrus flavor that makes Mountain Dew distinctive compared to plain lemon-lime sodas like Starry.

Is Mountain Dew gluten-free? Yes. Mountain Dew contains no gluten-containing ingredients. It is safe for customers with celiac disease or gluten sensitivity.

Is Mountain Dew vegan? Yes. No animal-derived ingredients are used in Mountain Dew's formula. It is suitable for vegan diets.

How to Order Mountain Dew at Papa Johns

Ordering Mountain Dew with your Papa Johns meal takes less than 30 seconds. Here is exactly how to do it on each platform:

Order Online papajohns.com

  • Go to papajohns.com and enter your delivery address or select carryout
  • Build your pizza and sides order
  • In the cart or during checkout, navigate to the Drinks section
  • Select Mountain Dew and choose your size: 20 oz or 2-Liter
  • Apply any promo code check current Papa Johns deals for drink bundles
  • Complete checkout

Order via Papa Johns App (iOS / Android)

  • Open the Papa Johns app and log into your Papa Rewards account
  • Select your nearest location
  • Add your food items to the cart
  • Tap Drinks in the menu and add Mountain Dew in your preferred size
  • Check for app-exclusive deals occasional free drink promotions run through the app only

Order via DoorDash / Uber Eats / Grubhub

Mountain Dew is available on all third-party delivery platforms that carry Papa Johns. Note that prices on these platforms are typically $0.50 to $1.00 higher than ordering direct. For the best price, ordering through the Papa Johns website or app is recommended.

Carryout Tip

If you are picking up your order, drinks are stored refrigerated until you arrive. Carryout Mountain Dew will always be colder than delivered Mountain Dew delivery drinks travel in a bag for 20 to 45 minutes. If maximum cold temperature matters to you, carryout or adding ice at home is the best approach. Check our Papa Johns Store Hours to find the best time for pickup.

Mountain Dew Deals at Papa Johns How to Save

  • Papa Pairings Deal: Two qualifying items for $6.99 each. A Mountain Dew 2-Liter often qualifies. This makes the 2-Liter an even better value when bundled. See all Papa Johns Coupon Codes for current deals.
  • Papa Rewards Points: Every purchase earns Papa Dough that can be redeemed on future orders, including drinks.
  • App-exclusive offers: The Papa Johns app regularly runs promotions that include free or discounted drinks with pizza orders.
  • 2-Liter vs 20 oz math: A 2-Liter ($3.49) gives 5 to 6 servings vs paying $2.99 for a single 20 oz. For any order of 2+ people, always get the 2-Liter.

Papa Johns and Mountain Dew The 'Cini Dirty Soda Collaboration (2025)

In May 2025, Papa Johns and Mountain Dew launched a limited-edition collaboration: the 'Cini Dirty Soda. This viral drink combined Mountain Dew's citrus flavor with Papa Johns' signature pepperoncini taste a bold, tangy, fizzy combination inspired by the dirty soda trend that swept the US in 2024.

The collaboration confirmed what regular Papa Johns customers already know: Mountain Dew and Papa Johns are a natural match, and the brand relationship between the two companies is strong. While the 'Cini Dirty Soda was a limited-time promotion, standard Mountain Dew remains a permanent fixture on the Papa Johns drinks menu.

Explore More Papa Johns Drinks

Mountain Dew is one of ten drinks available on the Papa Johns menu. Here are others to consider:

PEPSI

The classic cola pairing. Best with Pepperoni.

DIET PEPSI

Zero calories, full cola taste.

PEPSI ZERO SUGAR

0 calories, 69mg caffeine. Stronger.

STARRY

Caffeine-free lemon-lime.

See the full Papa Johns Drinks Menu 2026 for all options.

title: Papa Johns Closing Stores 2026: How Many, Why, and What It Means for You
author: Deals Team
excerpt: Papa Johns is closing up to 300 stores by 2027.
imageAlt: Papa Johns closing stores 2026 - location shutting down
content:
Last Updated: May 2026 | papajohns-menus.us

If you've been hearing rumors about Papa Johns shutting down locations near you - they're true. In February 2026, Papa Johns officially confirmed it is closing up to 300 North American stores by the end of 2027, with roughly 200 of those closures happening by the end of 2026.

This is the biggest contraction in Papa Johns' history. And if you're a regular customer, the question on your mind is simple: is my local store closing?

This guide covers everything confirmed - exactly how many stores are closing, why it's happening, which types of locations are most at risk, what Papa Johns says about the future, and how to check if your nearest store is affected. If you're looking to save on your last few orders at a closing location, check out the Papa Johns 50% off deal guide.

The Numbers - How Many Papa Johns Are Closing?

Here is what Papa Johns has officially confirmed, based on the company's February 26, 2026 earnings call and subsequent filings:

Detail Number
Total planned closures (North America)Up to 300 stores
Closures expected in 2026Approximately 200 stores
Closures expected in 2027Remaining ~100 stores
Total Papa Johns locations (end of 2025)~3,500 stores
Percentage of total locations affected~9%
Corporate layoffs announced alongside7% of ~700-person corporate workforce

To put that in perspective: closing 9% of your locations is significant but not catastrophic. Papa Johns will still have approximately 3,200 North American locations after the closures are complete - still one of the largest pizza delivery chains in the country, alongside competitors like Domino's and Pizza Hut.

Why Is Papa Johns Closing Stores?

Papa Johns CFO Ravi Thanawala was direct on the earnings call. The stores being closed are those that are "not meeting brand expectations or lack a clear path to sustainable financial improvement."

But that corporate language covers a much larger story. Here is the honest picture:

1. Seven Straight Quarters of Sales Declines

Papa Johns reported a 5.4% decline in same-store sales in North America in Q4 2025 - the fourth quarter ended December 28, 2025. That followed similarly weak results across seven of the previous eight quarters. When sales decline quarter after quarter, underperforming locations become mathematically unsustainable.

2. Net Income Collapsed

For full year 2025, Papa Johns reported:

  • Total revenues down slightly to $2.1 billion
  • Net income fell 62% to just $32 million
  • Q4 net income dropped to $9 million from $15 million the prior year

A 62% drop in net income in a single year is a serious number. It explains why drastic action was necessary.

3. The Weak Consumer Environment

CEO Todd Penegor acknowledged the results "reflected a weak consumer backdrop and elevated promotional environment." In plain terms: consumers are spending less on pizza delivery, and every chain has been discounting heavily to compete - which compresses margins. Many are looking for a small pizza price or free delivery just to justify an order. Inflation-weary customers are making fewer impulse orders.

4. Domino's Is Dominating

The competitive context matters here. Domino's has 34% buyer penetration in the U.S. QSR pizza market according to Circana's 2026 Definitive Restaurant Rankings. Papa Johns has just 11%. Domino's is actively targeting 50% market share - and it is executing on that goal. Papa Johns is fighting for relevance in a category increasingly dominated by one player. You can read our full Papa Johns vs Domino's comparison to see how the two stack up.

5. Old, Underperforming Franchise Locations

The majority of closing stores share a profile: they are more than 10 years old, franchise-owned, and operating in markets where either foot traffic has declined or a nearby Papa Johns already serves the same customer base. The CFO noted some closures are happening simply where stores are close enough together "to effectively transfer sales" to a remaining location.

Which Stores Are Closing? Is There a List?

This is the question everyone wants answered - and the honest answer is: Papa Johns has not released a specific list of closing locations.

Multiple major outlets including Fast Company, CNN, and USA TODAY have requested the list directly from Papa Johns. The company has declined to provide one.

What we do know about the profile of closing stores:

  • Franchise-owned (not corporate-owned) locations
  • More than 10 years old in many cases
  • Locations with consistently low sales volumes
  • Stores in markets with nearby overlapping Papa Johns locations
  • Stores without "a clear path to sustainable financial improvement"

How to Check If Your Local Store Is Closing

Since no official list exists, the most reliable way to check is:

Step 1: Go to the Papa Johns Store Locator and find your nearest location.

Step 2: Call the store directly and ask. Staff typically know their store's status.

Step 3: Check the Papa Johns app - stores that have been scheduled for closure are sometimes removed from the ordering system before the physical closure.

Step 4: Watch for local news coverage in your city - regional outlets have been tracking specific closures as they happen.

What Papa Johns Says About the Future

Despite the scale of the closures, Papa Johns leadership is framing this as a strategic cleanup rather than a retreat - and there is some data to support that position.

CFO Thanawala stated the closures are expected to increase average unit volumes by at least 3% by removing underperforming stores that drag down system-wide averages. When weak locations close, customers often migrate to nearby locations, boosting the remaining stores' numbers.

CEO Todd Penegor said in February 2026:

"In 2026, we are focused on continuing our transformation work to best position Papa Johns to win in a dynamic QSR category. Our strong balance sheet is supporting investment in these initiatives, which we believe will deliver high returns. We look forward with confidence in our ability to generate sustainable, profitable growth, and value creation."

Papa Johns has also committed to opening 180 to 220 gross new restaurants internationally in 2026 - focused on markets where growth is still strong. International same-store sales actually grew 5% in 2025, while North America struggled. The international business is the bright spot.

What Papa Johns Is Doing to Turn Things Around

The closures are not happening in isolation - they are part of a broader transformation plan under CEO Todd Penegor. Several parallel moves are underway:

New Menu Items

Papa Johns launched its Oven-Toasted Sandwiches in March 2026 - three flavors built on ciabatta bread and brushed with garlic sauce. These replaced the discontinued Papadias and Papa Bites, which were cut to simplify operations. The new Pan Pizza was also a major 2025-2026 launch.

Oven Recalibration

Penegor recalibrated ovens across all locations to improve cooking consistency - one of the most fundamental product quality moves the chain has made in years. This affects everything from the classic pizzas to the new stuffed crust pizza.

Menu Simplification

By cutting Papadias and Papa Bites, Papa Johns reduced operational complexity that was slowing down kitchen times and disrupting normal workflows. Simpler menus mean faster service and fewer mistakes. You can see the full current lineup in our Papa Johns menu prices guide.

Technology Investment

Papa Johns launched "Lou AI" in April 2026 - a digital pizza assistant designed to help groups navigate ordering decisions and reduce order friction. The chain is betting that better digital experiences will capture more online orders through the Papa Johns order system.

Chicken Innovation Coming

Papa Johns is testing chicken tenders with dipping sauces in the U.K. market with plans to bring the concept to North America. This would expand the menu into a category Domino's and Pizza Hut have not fully owned, building on the existing popularity of Papa Johns wings.

Is Papa Johns Going Out of Business?

No. This question has come up repeatedly since the closure announcement - and the answer is clearly no.

Closing 300 locations out of 6,000+ worldwide is a portfolio optimization, not a collapse. Papa Johns still operates in approximately 50 countries and territories and remains the world's third-largest pizza delivery company. Its international business is growing. Its balance sheet is described as strong, often highlighted in our nutrition and brand guide.

Companies in genuine financial distress do not invest in new menu categories, new technology platforms, and international expansion simultaneously. What Papa Johns is doing is painful but strategic: cutting the weakest 9% of its North American locations to make the remaining 91% healthier and more profitable.

For comparison: Pizza Hut announced the closure of 250 U.S. locations in early 2026 for nearly identical reasons. Wendy's announced significant closures. Even larger chains are rationalizing portfolios in a difficult consumer environment.

Papa Johns is not going out of business. It is getting smaller to get stronger.

My Analysis - What This Really Means

Having tracked the Papa Johns story closely, here is an honest read of the situation:

The closures are necessary and probably overdue. Papa Johns spent years expanding aggressively, and some of those locations never found their footing. Carrying 300 underperforming stores creates drag on franchisee morale, average unit economics, and brand perception. Cutting them is the right call.

The more interesting question is whether the menu innovation will work. The Oven-Toasted Sandwiches are a genuinely good product - read my full review here - and the Pan Pizza has been well received. But launching new items while simultaneously closing 200 stores creates noise that is hard to manage from a brand messaging standpoint.

The real risk for Papa Johns is not the closures themselves - it is whether the remaining stores can hold their customer base as Domino's continues its aggressive push. Domino's operational advantage in delivery logistics is real, and 11% buyer penetration versus 34% is a gap that new sandwiches alone will not close. Check out our Papa Johns desserts guide to see if their sweets can help bridge the gap.

Short-term forecast: 2026 will be a rough year by Papa Johns' own admission - they have guided for North American same-store sales to drop 2-4% this year. Expect more promotional activity, more deal-heavy ordering, and continued pressure.

Medium-term forecast: If the menu simplification and oven recalibration genuinely improve quality consistency, and if the new items attract new customer types, Papa Johns could exit 2026-2027 as a leaner, more focused chain. The international growth story is real and underappreciated.

For customers: If your local store is not on the closure list, your experience should improve as operational focus concentrates on fewer, healthier locations.

Papa Johns Closures vs Competitors - Industry Context

Papa Johns is not alone. The entire fast casual pizza sector is under pressure:

Chain 2026 Closures Reason
Papa Johns~200 in 2026Sales declines, franchise underperformance
Pizza Hut~250 in first half 2026Competition from Domino's, declining sales
Wendy'sMultiple locationsConsumer spending decline

The common thread is clear: inflation-weary consumers are making fewer fast food orders, every chain is over-discounting to compete, and margins have been crushed. The chains that emerge strongest will be those that rationalized their footprints early rather than waiting for the situation to force their hand.

How to Find Your Nearest Open Papa Johns

With closures ongoing through 2026 and 2027, it makes sense to verify your local store's status before placing an order:

  • Online: Papa Johns Store Locator
  • App: The Papa Johns app shows real-time store availability for delivery and carryout
  • Phone: Call your local store directly - the number is listed in the store locator

If your usual location has closed, the app and website will automatically show the next nearest available store.

faqs.question: How many Papa Johns stores are closing in 2026?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns confirmed it plans to close approximately 200 North American stores in 2026, with additional closures bringing the total to up to 300 by end of 2027. This represents roughly 9% of Papa Johns' approximately 3,500 North American locations as of end of 2025.

faqs.question: Why is Papa Johns closing stores in 2026?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns is closing underperforming franchise locations that are not meeting brand expectations or lack a clear path to sustainable financial improvement. The closures follow seven of eight quarters of same-store sales declines in North America, a 62% drop in net income for 2025, and a difficult consumer environment marked by inflation and reduced discretionary spending.

faqs.question: Is Papa Johns going out of business?
faqs.answer: No. Papa Johns is not going out of business. Closing 300 of its 6,000+ global locations is a portfolio optimization, not a shutdown. The company's international business grew 5% in 2025, its balance sheet is strong, and it is actively investing in new menu categories and technology. Papa Johns remains the world's third-largest pizza delivery chain.

faqs.question: Which Papa Johns locations are closing?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns has not released a specific list of closing locations. Closures will focus on franchise-owned stores that are more than 10 years old, have consistently low sales, or are located too close to other Papa Johns locations. To check your local store's status, use the Papa Johns Store Locator, call the store directly, or check availability in the Papa Johns app.

faqs.question: When will Papa Johns stores close?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns expects to close approximately 200 stores by the end of 2026, with the remaining closures completing by end of 2027. No specific timeline has been given for individual store closures. Stores scheduled for closure may be removed from the ordering system before the physical closure date.

faqs.question: How many Papa Johns locations are left after closures?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns had approximately 3,500 North American locations at end of 2025. After closing approximately 300 stores, roughly 3,200 North American locations will remain. Globally, Papa Johns operates more than 6,000 restaurants across approximately 50 countries and territories.

faqs.question: Are Papa Johns corporate stores or franchise stores closing?
faqs.answer: The majority of closing stores are franchise-owned locations. Papa Johns CFO Ravi Thanawala specified that closing stores are primarily franchisee-owned and not meeting brand expectations. Corporate-owned locations are largely not part of the closure plan.

faqs.question: Did Papa Johns also lay off employees in 2026?
faqs.answer: Yes. Alongside the store closure announcement, Papa Johns disclosed it had cut approximately 7% of its corporate workforce, roughly 49 people from its approximately 700-person corporate staff. These were corporate office positions, not store-level employees.

faqs.question: Is Pizza Hut also closing stores in 2026?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pizza Hut announced plans to close approximately 250 underperforming U.S. locations in the first half of 2026 for nearly identical reasons to Papa Johns. Both chains are responding to the same difficult consumer environment, increased competition from Domino's, and the need to rationalize underperforming franchise portfolios.

faqs.question: What is Papa Johns doing to recover from store closures?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns is pursuing a multi-pronged recovery strategy: launching new menu items including Oven-Toasted Sandwiches and Pan Pizza, recalibrating ovens for improved food quality, simplifying the menu by cutting Papadias and Papa Bites, investing in digital technology including its Lou AI ordering assistant, and focusing on international expansion where growth remains strong.
